7\u2192\\t\\\"context\\\"\\n     8\u2192\\t\\\"io\\\"\\n     9\u2192\\n    10\u2192\\t\\\"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\\\"\\n    11\u2192\\n    12\u2192\\t\\\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/identity\\\"\\n    13\u2192\\t\\\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/lock\\\"\\n    14\u2192\\t\\\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/logging/logfields\\\"\\n    15\u2192)\\n    16\u2192\\n    17\u2192// PolicyAuditLogger provides structured logging of policy evaluation decisions\\n    18\u2192// for audit and debugging purposes.\\n    19\u2192type PolicyAuditLogger struct {\\n    20\u2192\\tmutex      lock.Mutex\\n    21\u2192\\tlogger     *logrus.Entry\\n    22\u2192\\tlogLevel   logrus.Level\\n    23\u2192\\tauditLog   *logrus.Logger\\n    24\u2192\\tauditEntry *logrus.Entry\\n    25\u2192}\\n    26\u2192\\n    27\u2192// NewPolicyAuditLogger creates a new PolicyAuditLogger with the specified configuration.\\n    28\u2192// If auditOutput is provided, audit logs will be written to it in addition to the standard logger.\\n    29\u2192func NewPolicyAuditLogger(logLevel logrus.Level, auditOutput io.Writer) *PolicyAuditLogger {\\n    30\u2192\\tlogger := log.WithField(\\\"component\\\", \\\"audit\\\")\\n    31\u2192\\n    32\u2192\\tpal := &PolicyAuditLogger{\\n    33\u2192\\t\\tlogger:   logger,\\n    34\u2192\\t\\tlogLevel: logLevel,\\n    35\u2192\\t}\\n    36\u2192\\n    37\u2192\\t// If auditOutput is provided, create a separate audit logger\\n    38\u2192\\tif auditOutput != nil {\\n    39\u2192\\t\\tauditLog := logrus.New()\\n    40\u2192\\t\\tauditLog.SetFormatter(&logrus.JSONFormatter{})\\n    41\u2192\\t\\tauditLog.SetOutput(auditOutput)\\n    42\u2192\\t\\tauditLog.SetLevel(logLevel)\\n    43\u2192\\t\\tpal.auditLog = auditLog\\n    44\u2192\\t\\tpal.auditEntry = auditLog.WithField(logfields.LogSubsys, \\\"policy-audit\\\")\\n    45\u2192\\t}\\n    46\u2192\\n    47\u2192\\treturn pal\\n    48\u2192}\\n    49\u2192\\n    50\u2192// LogDecision logs a policy decision with the given parameters.\\n    51\u2192// This is used for audit trail of policy verdicts.\\n    52\u2192func (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) LogDecision(\\n    53\u2192\\tidentity identity.NumericIdentity,\\n    54\u2192\\tpolicy string,\\n    55\u2192\\tverdict string,\\n    56\u2192\\treason string,\\n    57\u2192) {\\n    58\u2192\\tpal.mutex.Lock()\\n    59\u2192\\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\\n    60\u2192\\n    61\u2192\\tfields := logrus.Fields{\\n    62\u2192\\t\\tlogfields.Identity: identity,\\n    63\u2192\\t\\t\\\"policy\\\":           policy,\\n    64\u2192\\t\\t\\\"verdict\\\":          verdict,\\n    65\u2192\\t\\t\\\"reason\\\":           reason,\\n    66\u2192\\t}\\n    67\u2192\\n    68\u2192\\t// Log to standard logger if enabled\\n    69\u2192\\tif pal.logger.Logger.Level >= pal.logLevel {\\n    70\u2192\\t\\tentry := pal.logger.WithFields(fields)\\n    71\u2192\\t\\tswitch verdict {\\n    72\u2192\\t\\tcase \\\"allow\\\":\\n    73\u2192\\t\\t\\tentry.Debug(\\\"Policy decision: allow\\\")\\n    74\u2192\\t\\tcase \\\"deny\\\":\\n    75\u2192\\t\\t\\tentry.Warning(\\\"Policy decision: deny\\\")\\n    76\u2192\\t\\tdefault:\\n    77\u2192\\t\\t\\tentry.Debug(\\\"Policy decision\\\")\\n    78\u2192\\t\\t}\\n    79\u2192\\t}\\n    80\u2192\\n    81\u2192\\t// Log to audit logger if configured\\n    82\u2192\\tif pal.auditEntry != nil {\\n    83\u2192\\t\\tpal.auditEntry.WithFields(fields).Info(\\\"policy-decision\\\")\\n    84\u2192\\t}\\n    85\u2192}\\n    86\u2192\\n    87\u2192// LogEvaluation logs a policy evaluation with full context.\\n    88\u2192// This provides detailed information about how a policy was evaluated against identities.\\n    89\u2192func (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) LogEvaluation(\\n    90\u2192\\tctx context.Context,\\n    91\u2192\\tpolicyKey string,\\n    92\u2192\\tselectorCache *SelectorCache,\\n    93\u2192\\tresult bool,\\n    94\u2192) {\\n    95\u2192\\tpal.mutex.Lock()\\n    96\u2192\\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\\n    97\u2192\\n    98\u2192\\tfields := logrus.Fields{\\n    99\u2192\\t\\tlogfields.PolicyKey: policyKey,\\n   100\u2192\\t\\t\\\"result\\\":            result,\\n   101\u2192\\t}\\n   102\u2192\\n   103\u2192\\t// Add selector cache info if available\\n   104\u2192\\tif selectorCache != nil {\\n   105\u2192\\t\\t// Get the model representation for audit purposes\\n   106\u2192\\t\\tmodel := selectorCache.GetModel()\\n   107\u2192\\t\\tfields[\\\"selectors_count\\\"] = len(model)\\n   108\u2192\\t}\\n   109\u2192\\n   110\u2192\\t// Log to standard logger if enabled\\n   111\u2192\\tif pal.logger.Logger.Level >= pal.logLevel {\\n   112\u2192\\t\\tentry := pal.logger.WithFields(fields)\\n   113\u2192\\t\\tif result {\\n   114\u2192\\t\\t\\tentry.Debug(\\\"Policy evaluation completed: pass\\\")\\n   115\u2192\\t\\t} else {\\n   116\u2192\\t\\t\\tentry.Debug(\\\"Policy evaluation completed: fail\\\")\\n   117\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   118\u2192\\t}\\n   119\u2192\\n   120\u2192\\t// Log to audit logger if configured\\n   121\u2192\\tif pal.auditEntry != nil {\\n   122\u2192\\t\\tpal.auditEntry.WithFields(fields).Info(\\\"policy-evaluation\\\")\\n   123\u2192\\t}\\n   124\u2192}\\n   125\u2192\\n   126\u2192// SetLogLevel updates the log level for both standard and audit loggers.\\n   127\u2192func (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) SetLogLevel(level logrus.Level) {\\n   128\u2192\\tpal.mutex.Lock()\\n   129\u2192\\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\\n   130\u2192\\n   131\u2192\\tpal.logLevel = level\\n   132\u2192\\tif pal.auditLog != nil {\\n   133\u2192\\t\\tpal.auditLog.SetLevel(level)\\n   134\u2192\\t}\\n   135\u2192}\\n   136\u2192\\n   137\u2192// GetLogLevel returns the current log level.\\n   138\u2192func (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) GetLogLevel() logrus.Level {\\n   139\u2192\\tpal.mutex.Lock()\\n   140\u2192\\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\\n   141\u2192\\treturn pal.logLevel\\n   142\u2192}\\n   143\u2192\\n\\n<system-reminder>\\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\\n</system-reminder>\\n\"}]},\"uuid\":\"e0e29d30-7c72-4e91-9ba2-951a7e9f75a1\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-03-02T22:24:47.683Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"14d36530-3006-43e7-9da6-1fe50376f074\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"e0e29d30-7c72-4e91-9ba2-951a7e9f75a1\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"2b267b83-8a0d-48dc-9b6d-ff294d81697b\",\"version\":\"2.1.63\",\"gitBranch\":\"main\",\"agentId\":\"ae78e49c80e908185\",\"slug\":\"crispy-launching-wigderson\",\"type\":\"progress\",\"data\":{\"type\":\"hook_progress\",\"hookEvent\":\"PostToolUse\",\"hookName\":\"PostToolUse:Read\",\"command\":\"callback\"},\"parentToolUseID\":\"toolu_013wDDcqczUQzp13pE9MSLcs\",\"toolUseID\":\"toolu_013wDDcqczUQzp13pE9MSLcs\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-03-02T22:24:47.683Z\",\"uuid\":\"ee52bf26-5949-4c30-9176-a2623270b5c7\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"ee52bf26-5949-4c30-9176-a2623270b5c7\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"2b267b83-8a0d-48dc-9b6d-ff294d81697b\",\"version\":\"2.1.63\",\"gitBranch\":\"main\",\"agentId\":\"ae78e49c80e908185\",\"slug\":\"crispy-launching-wigderson\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_014t66RXuwmTkkqtjkT9PbWZ\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Perfect!   "new_string": "// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n// Copyright Authors of Cilium\n\npackage policy\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/identity\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/lock\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/logging\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/logging/logfields\"\n)\n\nvar log = logging.DefaultLogger.WithField(logfields.LogSubsys, \"policy\")\n\nconst (\n\tauditLoggerSubsys = \"policy-audit\"\n\tlogMsgDecision    = \"policy-decision\"\n\tlogMsgEvaluation  = \"policy-evaluation\"\n\tfieldPolicy       = \"policy\"\n\tfieldVerdict      = \"verdict\"\n\tfieldReason       = \"reason\"\n\tfieldResult       = \"result\"\n)",
  "old_string": "// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n// Copyright Authors of Cilium\n\npackage policy\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"io\"\n\n\t\"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/identity\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/lock\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/logging/logfields\"\n)",

{
  "filePath": "/workspace/pkg/policy/audit_logger.go",
  "newString": "// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n// Copyright Authors of Cilium\n\npackage policy\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/identity\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/lock\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/logging\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/logging/logfields\"\n)\n\nvar log = logging.DefaultLogger.WithField(logfields.LogSubsys, \"policy\")\n\nconst (\n\tauditLoggerSubsys = \"policy-audit\"\n\tlogMsgDecision    = \"policy-decision\"\n\tlogMsgEvaluation  = \"policy-evaluation\"\n\tfieldPolicy       = \"policy\"\n\tfieldVerdict      = \"verdict\"\n\tfieldReason       = \"reason\"\n\tfieldResult       = \"result\"\n)",
  "oldString": "// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n// Copyright Authors of Cilium\n\npackage policy\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"io\"\n\n\t\"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/identity\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/lock\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/logging/logfields\"\n)",
  "originalFile": "// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n// Copyright Authors of Cilium\n\npackage policy\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"io\"\n\n\t\"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/identity\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/lock\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/logging/logfields\"\n)\n\n// PolicyAuditLogger provides structured logging of policy evaluation decisions\n// for audit and debugging purposes.\ntype PolicyAuditLogger struct {\n\tmutex      lock.Mutex\n\tlogger     *logrus.Entry\n\tlogLevel   logrus.Level\n\tauditLog   *logrus.Logger\n\tauditEntry *logrus.Entry\n}\n\n// NewPolicyAuditLogger creates a new PolicyAuditLogger with the specified configuration.\n// If auditOutput is provided, audit logs will be written to it in addition to the standard logger.\nfunc NewPolicyAuditLogger(logLevel logrus.Level, auditOutput io.Writer) *PolicyAuditLogger {\n\tlogger := log.WithField(\"component\", \"audit\")\n\n\tpal := &PolicyAuditLogger{\n\t\tlogger:   logger,\n\t\tlogLevel: logLevel,\n\t}\n\n\t// If auditOutput is provided, create a separate audit logger\n\tif auditOutput != nil {\n\t\tauditLog := logrus.New()\n\t\tauditLog.SetFormatter(&logrus.JSONFormatter{})\n\t\tauditLog.SetOutput(auditOutput)\n\t\tauditLog.SetLevel(logLevel)\n\t\tpal.auditLog = auditLog\n\t\tpal.auditEntry = auditLog.WithField(logfields.LogSubsys, \"policy-audit\")\n\t}\n\n\treturn pal\n}\n\n// LogDecision logs a policy decision with the given parameters.\n// This is used for audit trail of policy verdicts.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) LogDecision(\n\tidentity identity.NumericIdentity,\n\tpolicy string,\n\tverdict string,\n\treason string,\n) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tfields := logrus.Fields{\n\t\tlogfields.Identity: identity,\n\t\t\"policy\":           policy,\n\t\t\"verdict\":          verdict,\n\t\t\"reason\":           reason,\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to standard logger if enabled\n\tif pal.logger.Logger.Level >= pal.logLevel {\n\t\tentry := pal.logger.WithFields(fields)\n\t\tswitch verdict {\n\t\tcase \"allow\":\n\t\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy decision: allow\")\n\t\tcase \"deny\":\n\t\t\tentry.Warning(\"Policy decision: deny\")\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy decision\")\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to audit logger if configured\n\tif pal.auditEntry != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditEntry.WithFields(fields).Info(\"policy-decision\")\n\t}\n}\n\n// LogEvaluation logs a policy evaluation with full context.\n// This provides detailed information about how a policy was evaluated against identities.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) LogEvaluation(\n\tctx context.Context,\n\tpolicyKey string,\n\tselectorCache *SelectorCache,\n\tresult bool,\n) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tfields := logrus.Fields{\n\t\tlogfields.PolicyKey: policyKey,\n\t\t\"result\":            result,\n\t}\n\n\t// Add selector cache info if available\n\tif selectorCache != nil {\n\t\t// Get the model representation for audit purposes\n\t\tmodel := selectorCache.GetModel()\n\t\tfields[\"selectors_count\"] = len(model)\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to standard logger if enabled\n\tif pal.logger.Logger.Level >= pal.logLevel {\n\t\tentry := pal.logger.WithFields(fields)\n\t\tif result {\n\t\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy evaluation completed: pass\")\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy evaluation completed: fail\")\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to audit logger if configured\n\tif pal.auditEntry != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditEntry.WithFields(fields).Info(\"policy-evaluation\")\n\t}\n}\n\n// SetLogLevel updates the log level for both standard and audit loggers.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) SetLogLevel(level logrus.Level) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tpal.logLevel = level\n\tif pal.auditLog != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditLog.SetLevel(level)\n\t}\n}\n\n// GetLogLevel returns the current log level.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) GetLogLevel() logrus.Level {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\treturn pal.logLevel\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        " import (",
        "   \"context\"",
        "   \"io\"",
        "+  \"time\"",
        " ",
        "   \"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"",
        " ",
        "   \"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/identity\"",
        "   \"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/lock\"",
        "+  \"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/logging\"",
        "   \"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/logging/logfields\"",
        " )",
        " ",
        "+var log = logging.DefaultLogger.WithField(logfields.LogSubsys, \"policy\")",
        "+",
        "+const (",
        "+  auditLoggerSubsys = \"policy-audit\"",
        "+  logMsgDecision    = \"policy-decision\"",
        "+  logMsgEvaluation  = \"policy-evaluation\"",
        "+  fieldPolicy       = \"policy\"",
        "+  fieldVerdict      = \"verdict\"",
        "+  fieldReason       = \"reason\"",
        "+  fieldResult       = \"result\"",
        "+)",
        "+",
        " // PolicyAuditLogger provides structured logging of policy evaluation decisions",
        " // for audit and debugging purposes.",
        " type PolicyAuditLogger struct {"
      ],
      "newLines": 28,
      "newStart": 6,
      "oldLines": 14,
      "oldStart": 6
    }
  ],
  "userModified": false
}

  "newString": "// PolicyAuditLogger provides structured logging of policy evaluation decisions\n// for audit and debugging purposes.\ntype PolicyAuditLogger struct {\n\tmutex      lock.Mutex\n\tlogger     *logrus.Entry\n\tauditLog   *logrus.Logger\n\tauditEntry *logrus.Entry\n}",
  "oldString": "// PolicyAuditLogger provides structured logging of policy evaluation decisions\n// for audit and debugging purposes.\ntype PolicyAuditLogger struct {\n\tmutex      lock.Mutex\n\tlogger     *logrus.Entry\n\tlogLevel   logrus.Level\n\tauditLog   *logrus.Logger\n\tauditEntry *logrus.Entry\n}",
  "originalFile": "// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n// Copyright Authors of Cilium\n\npackage policy\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/identity\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/lock\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/logging\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/logging/logfields\"\n)\n\nvar log = logging.DefaultLogger.WithField(logfields.LogSubsys, \"policy\")\n\nconst (\n\tauditLoggerSubsys = \"policy-audit\"\n\tlogMsgDecision    = \"policy-decision\"\n\tlogMsgEvaluation  = \"policy-evaluation\"\n\tfieldPolicy       = \"policy\"\n\tfieldVerdict      = \"verdict\"\n\tfieldReason       = \"reason\"\n\tfieldResult       = \"result\"\n)\n\n// PolicyAuditLogger provides structured logging of policy evaluation decisions\n// for audit and debugging purposes.\ntype PolicyAuditLogger struct {\n\tmutex      lock.Mutex\n\tlogger     *logrus.Entry\n\tlogLevel   logrus.Level\n\tauditLog   *logrus.Logger\n\tauditEntry *logrus.Entry\n}\n\n// NewPolicyAuditLogger creates a new PolicyAuditLogger with the specified configuration.\n// If auditOutput is provided, audit logs will be written to it in addition to the standard logger.\nfunc NewPolicyAuditLogger(logLevel logrus.Level, auditOutput io.Writer) *PolicyAuditLogger {\n\tlogger := log.WithField(\"component\", \"audit\")\n\n\tpal := &PolicyAuditLogger{\n\t\tlogger:   logger,\n\t\tlogLevel: logLevel,\n\t}\n\n\t// If auditOutput is provided, create a separate audit logger\n\tif auditOutput != nil {\n\t\tauditLog := logrus.New()\n\t\tauditLog.SetFormatter(&logrus.JSONFormatter{})\n\t\tauditLog.SetOutput(auditOutput)\n\t\tauditLog.SetLevel(logLevel)\n\t\tpal.auditLog = auditLog\n\t\tpal.auditEntry = auditLog.WithField(logfields.LogSubsys, \"policy-audit\")\n\t}\n\n\treturn pal\n}\n\n// LogDecision logs a policy decision with the given parameters.\n// This is used for audit trail of policy verdicts.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) LogDecision(\n\tidentity identity.NumericIdentity,\n\tpolicy string,\n\tverdict string,\n\treason string,\n) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tfields := logrus.Fields{\n\t\tlogfields.Identity: identity,\n\t\t\"policy\":           policy,\n\t\t\"verdict\":          verdict,\n\t\t\"reason\":           reason,\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to standard logger if enabled\n\tif pal.logger.Logger.Level >= pal.logLevel {\n\t\tentry := pal.logger.WithFields(fields)\n\t\tswitch verdict {\n\t\tcase \"allow\":\n\t\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy decision: allow\")\n\t\tcase \"deny\":\n\t\t\tentry.Warning(\"Policy decision: deny\")\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy decision\")\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to audit logger if configured\n\tif pal.auditEntry != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditEntry.WithFields(fields).Info(\"policy-decision\")\n\t}\n}\n\n// LogEvaluation logs a policy evaluation with full context.\n// This provides detailed information about how a policy was evaluated against identities.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) LogEvaluation(\n\tctx context.Context,\n\tpolicyKey string,\n\tselectorCache *SelectorCache,\n\tresult bool,\n) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tfields := logrus.Fields{\n\t\tlogfields.PolicyKey: policyKey,\n\t\t\"result\":            result,\n\t}\n\n\t// Add selector cache info if available\n\tif selectorCache != nil {\n\t\t// Get the model representation for audit purposes\n\t\tmodel := selectorCache.GetModel()\n\t\tfields[\"selectors_count\"] = len(model)\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to standard logger if enabled\n\tif pal.logger.Logger.Level >= pal.logLevel {\n\t\tentry := pal.logger.WithFields(fields)\n\t\tif result {\n\t\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy evaluation completed: pass\")\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy evaluation completed: fail\")\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to audit logger if configured\n\tif pal.auditEntry != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditEntry.WithFields(fields).Info(\"policy-evaluation\")\n\t}\n}\n\n// SetLogLevel updates the log level for both standard and audit loggers.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) SetLogLevel(level logrus.Level) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tpal.logLevel = level\n\tif pal.auditLog != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditLog.SetLevel(level)\n\t}\n}\n\n// GetLogLevel returns the current log level.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) GetLogLevel() logrus.Level {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\treturn pal.logLevel\n}\n",

Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/pkg/policy/audit_logger.go",
  "new_string": "// NewPolicyAuditLogger creates a new PolicyAuditLogger with the specified configuration.\n// If auditOutput is provided, audit logs will be written to it in addition to the standard logger.\nfunc NewPolicyAuditLogger(logLevel logrus.Level, auditOutput io.Writer) *PolicyAuditLogger {\n\tpal := &PolicyAuditLogger{\n\t\tlogger: log.WithField(\"component\", \"audit\"),\n\t}\n\n\t// If auditOutput is provided, create a separate audit logger\n\tif auditOutput != nil {\n\t\tauditLog := logrus.New()\n\t\tauditLog.SetFormatter(&logrus.JSONFormatter{\n\t\t\tDisableTimestamp: false,\n\t\t\tTimestampFormat:  time.RFC3339Nano,\n\t\t})\n\t\tauditLog.SetOutput(auditOutput)\n\t\tauditLog.SetLevel(logLevel)\n\t\tpal.auditLog = auditLog\n\t\tpal.auditEntry = auditLog.WithField(logfields.LogSubsys, auditLoggerSubsys)\n\t}\n\n\treturn pal\n}",
  "old_string": "// NewPolicyAuditLogger creates a new PolicyAuditLogger with the specified configuration.\n// If auditOutput is provided, audit logs will be written to it in addition to the standard logger.\nfunc NewPolicyAuditLogger(logLevel logrus.Level, auditOutput io.Writer) *PolicyAuditLogger {\n\tlogger := log.WithField(\"component\", \"audit\")\n\n\tpal := &PolicyAuditLogger{\n\t\tlogger:   logger,\n\t\tlogLevel: logLevel,\n\t}\n\n\t// If auditOutput is provided, create a separate audit logger\n\tif auditOutput != nil {\n\t\tauditLog := logrus.New()\n\t\tauditLog.SetFormatter(&logrus.JSONFormatter{})\n\t\tauditLog.SetOutput(auditOutput)\n\t\tauditLog.SetLevel(logLevel)\n\t\tpal.auditLog = auditLog\n\t\tpal.auditEntry = auditLog.WithField(logfields.LogSubsys, \"policy-audit\")\n\t}\n\n\treturn pal\n}",
  "replace_all": false
}

  "newString": "// NewPolicyAuditLogger creates a new PolicyAuditLogger with the specified configuration.\n// If auditOutput is provided, audit logs will be written to it in addition to the standard logger.\nfunc NewPolicyAuditLogger(logLevel logrus.Level, auditOutput io.Writer) *PolicyAuditLogger {\n\tpal := &PolicyAuditLogger{\n\t\tlogger: log.WithField(\"component\", \"audit\"),\n\t}\n\n\t// If auditOutput is provided, create a separate audit logger\n\tif auditOutput != nil {\n\t\tauditLog := logrus.New()\n\t\tauditLog.SetFormatter(&logrus.JSONFormatter{\n\t\t\tDisableTimestamp: false,\n\t\t\tTimestampFormat:  time.RFC3339Nano,\n\t\t})\n\t\tauditLog.SetOutput(auditOutput)\n\t\tauditLog.SetLevel(logLevel)\n\t\tpal.auditLog = auditLog\n\t\tpal.auditEntry = auditLog.WithField(logfields.LogSubsys, auditLoggerSubsys)\n\t}\n\n\treturn pal\n}",
  "oldString": "// NewPolicyAuditLogger creates a new PolicyAuditLogger with the specified configuration.\n// If auditOutput is provided, audit logs will be written to it in addition to the standard logger.\nfunc NewPolicyAuditLogger(logLevel logrus.Level, auditOutput io.Writer) *PolicyAuditLogger {\n\tlogger := log.WithField(\"component\", \"audit\")\n\n\tpal := &PolicyAuditLogger{\n\t\tlogger:   logger,\n\t\tlogLevel: logLevel,\n\t}\n\n\t// If auditOutput is provided, create a separate audit logger\n\tif auditOutput != nil {\n\t\tauditLog := logrus.New()\n\t\tauditLog.SetFormatter(&logrus.JSONFormatter{})\n\t\tauditLog.SetOutput(auditOutput)\n\t\tauditLog.SetLevel(logLevel)\n\t\tpal.auditLog = auditLog\n\t\tpal.auditEntry = auditLog.WithField(logfields.LogSubsys, \"policy-audit\")\n\t}\n\n\treturn pal\n}",
  "originalFile": "// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n// Copyright Authors of Cilium\n\npackage policy\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/identity\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/lock\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/logging\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/logging/logfields\"\n)\n\nvar log = logging.DefaultLogger.WithField(logfields.LogSubsys, \"policy\")\n\nconst (\n\tauditLoggerSubsys = \"policy-audit\"\n\tlogMsgDecision    = \"policy-decision\"\n\tlogMsgEvaluation  = \"policy-evaluation\"\n\tfieldPolicy       = \"policy\"\n\tfieldVerdict      = \"verdict\"\n\tfieldReason       = \"reason\"\n\tfieldResult       = \"result\"\n)\n\n// PolicyAuditLogger provides structured logging of policy evaluation decisions\n// for audit and debugging purposes.\ntype PolicyAuditLogger struct {\n\tmutex      lock.Mutex\n\tlogger     *logrus.Entry\n\tauditLog   *logrus.Logger\n\tauditEntry *logrus.Entry\n}\n\n// NewPolicyAuditLogger creates a new PolicyAuditLogger with the specified configuration.\n// If auditOutput is provided, audit logs will be written to it in addition to the standard logger.\nfunc NewPolicyAuditLogger(logLevel logrus.Level, auditOutput io.Writer) *PolicyAuditLogger {\n\tlogger := log.WithField(\"component\", \"audit\")\n\n\tpal := &PolicyAuditLogger{\n\t\tlogger:   logger,\n\t\tlogLevel: logLevel,\n\t}\n\n\t// If auditOutput is provided, create a separate audit logger\n\tif auditOutput != nil {\n\t\tauditLog := logrus.New()\n\t\tauditLog.SetFormatter(&logrus.JSONFormatter{})\n\t\tauditLog.SetOutput(auditOutput)\n\t\tauditLog.SetLevel(logLevel)\n\t\tpal.auditLog = auditLog\n\t\tpal.auditEntry = auditLog.WithField(logfields.LogSubsys, \"policy-audit\")\n\t}\n\n\treturn pal\n}\n\n// LogDecision logs a policy decision with the given parameters.\n// This is used for audit trail of policy verdicts.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) LogDecision(\n\tidentity identity.NumericIdentity,\n\tpolicy string,\n\tverdict string,\n\treason string,\n) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tfields := logrus.Fields{\n\t\tlogfields.Identity: identity,\n\t\t\"policy\":           policy,\n\t\t\"verdict\":          verdict,\n\t\t\"reason\":           reason,\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to standard logger if enabled\n\tif pal.logger.Logger.Level >= pal.logLevel {\n\t\tentry := pal.logger.WithFields(fields)\n\t\tswitch verdict {\n\t\tcase \"allow\":\n\t\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy decision: allow\")\n\t\tcase \"deny\":\n\t\t\tentry.Warning(\"Policy decision: deny\")\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy decision\")\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to audit logger if configured\n\tif pal.auditEntry != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditEntry.WithFields(fields).Info(\"policy-decision\")\n\t}\n}\n\n// LogEvaluation logs a policy evaluation with full context.\n// This provides detailed information about how a policy was evaluated against identities.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) LogEvaluation(\n\tctx context.Context,\n\tpolicyKey string,\n\tselectorCache *SelectorCache,\n\tresult bool,\n) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tfields := logrus.Fields{\n\t\tlogfields.PolicyKey: policyKey,\n\t\t\"result\":            result,\n\t}\n\n\t// Add selector cache info if available\n\tif selectorCache != nil {\n\t\t// Get the model representation for audit purposes\n\t\tmodel := selectorCache.GetModel()\n\t\tfields[\"selectors_count\"] = len(model)\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to standard logger if enabled\n\tif pal.logger.Logger.Level >= pal.logLevel {\n\t\tentry := pal.logger.WithFields(fields)\n\t\tif result {\n\t\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy evaluation completed: pass\")\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy evaluation completed: fail\")\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to audit logger if configured\n\tif pal.auditEntry != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditEntry.WithFields(fields).Info(\"policy-evaluation\")\n\t}\n}\n\n// SetLogLevel updates the log level for both standard and audit loggers.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) SetLogLevel(level logrus.Level) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tpal.logLevel = level\n\tif pal.auditLog != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditLog.SetLevel(level)\n\t}\n}\n\n// GetLogLevel returns the current log level.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) GetLogLevel() logrus.Level {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\treturn pal.logLevel\n}\n",

82. Edit @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/pkg/policy/audit_logger.go",
  "new_string": "// LogDecision logs a policy decision with the given parameters.\n// This is used for audit trail of policy verdicts.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) LogDecision(\n\tidentity identity.NumericIdentity,\n\tpolicy string,\n\tverdict string,\n\treason string,\n) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tfields := logrus.Fields{\n\t\tlogfields.Identity: identity,\n\t\tfieldPolicy:        policy,\n\t\tfieldVerdict:       verdict,\n\t\tfieldReason:        reason,\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to standard logger\n\tentry := pal.logger.WithFields(fields)\n\tswitch verdict {\n\tcase \"allow\":\n\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy decision: allow\")\n\tcase \"deny\":\n\t\tentry.Warning(\"Policy decision: deny\")\n\tdefault:\n\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy decision\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to audit logger if configured\n\tif pal.auditEntry != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditEntry.WithFields(fields).Info(logMsgDecision)\n\t}\n}",
  "old_string": "// LogDecision logs a policy decision with the given parameters.\n// This is used for audit trail of policy verdicts.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) LogDecision(\n\tidentity identity.NumericIdentity,\n\tpolicy string,\n\tverdict string,\n\treason string,\n) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tfields := logrus.Fields{\n\t\tlogfields.Identity: identity,\n\t\t\"policy\":           policy,\n\t\t\"verdict\":          verdict,\n\t\t\"reason\":           reason,\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to standard logger if enabled\n\tif pal.logger.Logger.Level >= pal.logLevel {\n\t\tentry := pal.logger.WithFields(fields)\n\t\tswitch verdict {\n\t\tcase \"allow\":\n\t\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy decision: allow\")\n\t\tcase \"deny\":\n\t\t\tentry.Warning(\"Policy decision: deny\")\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy decision\")\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to audit logger if configured\n\tif pal.auditEntry != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditEntry.WithFields(fields).Info(\"policy-decision\")\n\t}\n}",
  "replace_all": false
}
Output
{
  "filePath": "/workspace/pkg/policy/audit_logger.go",
  "newString": "// LogDecision logs a policy decision with the given parameters.\n// This is used for audit trail of policy verdicts.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) LogDecision(\n\tidentity identity.NumericIdentity,\n\tpolicy string,\n\tverdict string,\n\treason string,\n) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tfields := logrus.Fields{\n\t\tlogfields.Identity: identity,\n\t\tfieldPolicy:        policy,\n\t\tfieldVerdict:       verdict,\n\t\tfieldReason:        reason,\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to standard logger\n\tentry := pal.logger.WithFields(fields)\n\tswitch verdict {\n\tcase \"allow\":\n\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy decision: allow\")\n\tcase \"deny\":\n\t\tentry.Warning(\"Policy decision: deny\")\n\tdefault:\n\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy decision\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to audit logger if configured\n\tif pal.auditEntry != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditEntry.WithFields(fields).Info(logMsgDecision)\n\t}\n}",
  "oldString": "// LogDecision logs a policy decision with the given parameters.\n// This is used for audit trail of policy verdicts.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) LogDecision(\n\tidentity identity.NumericIdentity,\n\tpolicy string,\n\tverdict string,\n\treason string,\n) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tfields := logrus.Fields{\n\t\tlogfields.Identity: identity,\n\t\t\"policy\":           policy,\n\t\t\"verdict\":          verdict,\n\t\t\"reason\":           reason,\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to standard logger if enabled\n\tif pal.logger.Logger.Level >= pal.logLevel {\n\t\tentry := pal.logger.WithFields(fields)\n\t\tswitch verdict {\n\t\tcase \"allow\":\n\t\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy decision: allow\")\n\t\tcase \"deny\":\n\t\t\tentry.Warning(\"Policy decision: deny\")\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy decision\")\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to audit logger if configured\n\tif pal.auditEntry != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditEntry.WithFields(fields).Info(\"policy-decision\")\n\t}\n}",
  "originalFile": "// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n// Copyright Authors of Cilium\n\npackage policy\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/identity\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/lock\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/logging\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/logging/logfields\"\n)\n\nvar log = logging.DefaultLogger.WithField(logfields.LogSubsys, \"policy\")\n\nconst (\n\tauditLoggerSubsys = \"policy-audit\"\n\tlogMsgDecision    = \"policy-decision\"\n\tlogMsgEvaluation  = \"policy-evaluation\"\n\tfieldPolicy       = \"policy\"\n\tfieldVerdict      = \"verdict\"\n\tfieldReason       = \"reason\"\n\tfieldResult       = \"result\"\n)\n\n// PolicyAuditLogger provides structured logging of policy evaluation decisions\n// for audit and debugging purposes.\ntype PolicyAuditLogger struct {\n\tmutex      lock.Mutex\n\tlogger     *logrus.Entry\n\tauditLog   *logrus.Logger\n\tauditEntry *logrus.Entry\n}\n\n// NewPolicyAuditLogger creates a new PolicyAuditLogger with the specified configuration.\n// If auditOutput is provided, audit logs will be written to it in addition to the standard logger.\nfunc NewPolicyAuditLogger(logLevel logrus.Level, auditOutput io.Writer) *PolicyAuditLogger {\n\tpal := &PolicyAuditLogger{\n\t\tlogger: log.WithField(\"component\", \"audit\"),\n\t}\n\n\t// If auditOutput is provided, create a separate audit logger\n\tif auditOutput != nil {\n\t\tauditLog := logrus.New()\n\t\tauditLog.SetFormatter(&logrus.JSONFormatter{\n\t\t\tDisableTimestamp: false,\n\t\t\tTimestampFormat:  time.RFC3339Nano,\n\t\t})\n\t\tauditLog.SetOutput(auditOutput)\n\t\tauditLog.SetLevel(logLevel)\n\t\tpal.auditLog = auditLog\n\t\tpal.auditEntry = auditLog.WithField(logfields.LogSubsys, auditLoggerSubsys)\n\t}\n\n\treturn pal\n}\n\n// LogDecision logs a policy decision with the given parameters.\n// This is used for audit trail of policy verdicts.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) LogDecision(\n\tidentity identity.NumericIdentity,\n\tpolicy string,\n\tverdict string,\n\treason string,\n) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tfields := logrus.Fields{\n\t\tlogfields.Identity: identity,\n\t\t\"policy\":           policy,\n\t\t\"verdict\":          verdict,\n\t\t\"reason\":           reason,\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to standard logger if enabled\n\tif pal.logger.Logger.Level >= pal.logLevel {\n\t\tentry := pal.logger.WithFields(fields)\n\t\tswitch verdict {\n\t\tcase \"allow\":\n\t\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy decision: allow\")\n\t\tcase \"deny\":\n\t\t\tentry.Warning(\"Policy decision: deny\")\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy decision\")\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to audit logger if configured\n\tif pal.auditEntry != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditEntry.WithFields(fields).Info(\"policy-decision\")\n\t}\n}\n\n// LogEvaluation logs a policy evaluation with full context.\n// This provides detailed information about how a policy was evaluated against identities.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) LogEvaluation(\n\tctx context.Context,\n\tpolicyKey string,\n\tselectorCache *SelectorCache,\n\tresult bool,\n) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tfields := logrus.Fields{\n\t\tlogfields.PolicyKey: policyKey,\n\t\t\"result\":            result,\n\t}\n\n\t// Add selector cache info if available\n\tif selectorCache != nil {\n\t\t// Get the model representation for audit purposes\n\t\tmodel := selectorCache.GetModel()\n\t\tfields[\"selectors_count\"] = len(model)\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to standard logger if enabled\n\tif pal.logger.Logger.Level >= pal.logLevel {\n\t\tentry := pal.logger.WithFields(fields)\n\t\tif result {\n\t\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy evaluation completed: pass\")\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy evaluation completed: fail\")\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to audit logger if configured\n\tif pal.auditEntry != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditEntry.WithFields(fields).Info(\"policy-evaluation\")\n\t}\n}\n\n// SetLogLevel updates the log level for both standard and audit loggers.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) SetLogLevel(level logrus.Level) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tpal.logLevel = level\n\tif pal.auditLog != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditLog.SetLevel(level)\n\t}\n}\n\n// GetLogLevel returns the current log level.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) GetLogLevel() logrus.Level {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\treturn pal.logLevel\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        " ",
        "   fields := logrus.Fields{",
        "     logfields.Identity: identity,",
        "-    \"policy\":           policy,",
        "-    \"verdict\":          verdict,",
        "-    \"reason\":           reason,",
        "+    fieldPolicy:        policy,",
        "+    fieldVerdict:       verdict,",
        "+    fieldReason:        reason,",
        "   }",
        " ",
        "-  // Log to standard logger if enabled",
        "-  if pal.logger.Logger.Level >= pal.logLevel {",
        "-    entry := pal.logger.WithFields(fields)",
        "-    switch verdict {",
        "-    case \"allow\":",
        "-      entry.Debug(\"Policy decision: allow\")",
        "-    case \"deny\":",
        "-      entry.Warning(\"Policy decision: deny\")",
        "-    default:",
        "-      entry.Debug(\"Policy decision\")",
        "-    }",
        "+  // Log to standard logger",
        "+  entry := pal.logger.WithFields(fields)",
        "+  switch verdict {",
        "+  case \"allow\":",
        "+    entry.Debug(\"Policy decision: allow\")",
        "+  case \"deny\":",
        "+    entry.Warning(\"Policy decision: deny\")",
        "+  default:",
        "+    entry.Debug(\"Policy decision\")",
        "   }",
        " ",
        "   // Log to audit logger if configured",
        "   if pal.auditEntry != nil {",
        "-    pal.auditEntry.WithFields(fields).Info(\"policy-decision\")",
        "+    pal.auditEntry.WithFields(fields).Info(logMsgDecision)",
        "   }",
        " }",
        " "
      ],
      "newLines": 25,
      "newStart": 73,
      "oldLines": 27,
      "oldStart": 73
    }
  ],
  "userModified": false
}

Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/pkg/policy/audit_logger.go",
  "new_string": "// LogEvaluation logs a policy evaluation with full context.\n// This provides detailed information about how a policy was evaluated against identities.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) LogEvaluation(\n\tctx context.Context,\n\tpolicyKey string,\n\tselectorCache *SelectorCache,\n\tresult bool,\n) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tfields := logrus.Fields{\n\t\tlogfields.PolicyKey: policyKey,\n\t\tfieldResult:         result,\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to standard logger\n\tentry := pal.logger.WithFields(fields)\n\tif result {\n\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy evaluation completed: pass\")\n\t} else {\n\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy evaluation completed: fail\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to audit logger if configured\n\tif pal.auditEntry != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditEntry.WithFields(fields).Info(logMsgEvaluation)\n\t}\n}",
  "old_string": "// LogEvaluation logs a policy evaluation with full context.\n// This provides detailed information about how a policy was evaluated against identities.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) LogEvaluation(\n\tctx context.Context,\n\tpolicyKey string,\n\tselectorCache *SelectorCache,\n\tresult bool,\n) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tfields := logrus.Fields{\n\t\tlogfields.PolicyKey: policyKey,\n\t\t\"result\":            result,\n\t}\n\n\t// Add selector cache info if available\n\tif selectorCache != nil {\n\t\t// Get the model representation for audit purposes\n\t\tmodel := selectorCache.GetModel()\n\t\tfields[\"selectors_count\"] = len(model)\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to standard logger if enabled\n\tif pal.logger.Logger.Level >= pal.logLevel {\n\t\tentry := pal.logger.WithFields(fields)\n\t\tif result {\n\t\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy evaluation completed: pass\")\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy evaluation completed: fail\")\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to audit logger if configured\n\tif pal.auditEntry != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditEntry.WithFields(fields).Info(\"policy-evaluation\")\n\t}\n}",
  "replace_all": false
}

  "newString": "// LogEvaluation logs a policy evaluation with full context.\n// This provides detailed information about how a policy was evaluated against identities.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) LogEvaluation(\n\tctx context.Context,\n\tpolicyKey string,\n\tselectorCache *SelectorCache,\n\tresult bool,\n) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tfields := logrus.Fields{\n\t\tlogfields.PolicyKey: policyKey,\n\t\tfieldResult:         result,\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to standard logger\n\tentry := pal.logger.WithFields(fields)\n\tif result {\n\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy evaluation completed: pass\")\n\t} else {\n\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy evaluation completed: fail\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to audit logger if configured\n\tif pal.auditEntry != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditEntry.WithFields(fields).Info(logMsgEvaluation)\n\t}\n}",
  "oldString": "// LogEvaluation logs a policy evaluation with full context.\n// This provides detailed information about how a policy was evaluated against identities.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) LogEvaluation(\n\tctx context.Context,\n\tpolicyKey string,\n\tselectorCache *SelectorCache,\n\tresult bool,\n) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tfields := logrus.Fields{\n\t\tlogfields.PolicyKey: policyKey,\n\t\t\"result\":            result,\n\t}\n\n\t// Add selector cache info if available\n\tif selectorCache != nil {\n\t\t// Get the model representation for audit purposes\n\t\tmodel := selectorCache.GetModel()\n\t\tfields[\"selectors_count\"] = len(model)\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to standard logger if enabled\n\tif pal.logger.Logger.Level >= pal.logLevel {\n\t\tentry := pal.logger.WithFields(fields)\n\t\tif result {\n\t\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy evaluation completed: pass\")\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy evaluation completed: fail\")\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to audit logger if configured\n\tif pal.auditEntry != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditEntry.WithFields(fields).Info(\"policy-evaluation\")\n\t}\n}",
  "originalFile": "// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n// Copyright Authors of Cilium\n\npackage policy\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/identity\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/lock\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/logging\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/logging/logfields\"\n)\n\nvar log = logging.DefaultLogger.WithField(logfields.LogSubsys, \"policy\")\n\nconst (\n\tauditLoggerSubsys = \"policy-audit\"\n\tlogMsgDecision    = \"policy-decision\"\n\tlogMsgEvaluation  = \"policy-evaluation\"\n\tfieldPolicy       = \"policy\"\n\tfieldVerdict      = \"verdict\"\n\tfieldReason       = \"reason\"\n\tfieldResult       = \"result\"\n)\n\n// PolicyAuditLogger provides structured logging of policy evaluation decisions\n// for audit and debugging purposes.\ntype PolicyAuditLogger struct {\n\tmutex      lock.Mutex\n\tlogger     *logrus.Entry\n\tauditLog   *logrus.Logger\n\tauditEntry *logrus.Entry\n}\n\n// NewPolicyAuditLogger creates a new PolicyAuditLogger with the specified configuration.\n// If auditOutput is provided, audit logs will be written to it in addition to the standard logger.\nfunc NewPolicyAuditLogger(logLevel logrus.Level, auditOutput io.Writer) *PolicyAuditLogger {\n\tpal := &PolicyAuditLogger{\n\t\tlogger: log.WithField(\"component\", \"audit\"),\n\t}\n\n\t// If auditOutput is provided, create a separate audit logger\n\tif auditOutput != nil {\n\t\tauditLog := logrus.New()\n\t\tauditLog.SetFormatter(&logrus.JSONFormatter{\n\t\t\tDisableTimestamp: false,\n\t\t\tTimestampFormat:  time.RFC3339Nano,\n\t\t})\n\t\tauditLog.SetOutput(auditOutput)\n\t\tauditLog.SetLevel(logLevel)\n\t\tpal.auditLog = auditLog\n\t\tpal.auditEntry = auditLog.WithField(logfields.LogSubsys, auditLoggerSubsys)\n\t}\n\n\treturn pal\n}\n\n// LogDecision logs a policy decision with the given parameters.\n// This is used for audit trail of policy verdicts.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) LogDecision(\n\tidentity identity.NumericIdentity,\n\tpolicy string,\n\tverdict string,\n\treason string,\n) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tfields := logrus.Fields{\n\t\tlogfields.Identity: identity,\n\t\tfieldPolicy:        policy,\n\t\tfieldVerdict:       verdict,\n\t\tfieldReason:        reason,\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to standard logger\n\tentry := pal.logger.WithFields(fields)\n\tswitch verdict {\n\tcase \"allow\":\n\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy decision: allow\")\n\tcase \"deny\":\n\t\tentry.Warning(\"Policy decision: deny\")\n\tdefault:\n\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy decision\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to audit logger if configured\n\tif pal.auditEntry != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditEntry.WithFields(fields).Info(logMsgDecision)\n\t}\n}\n\n// LogEvaluation logs a policy evaluation with full context.\n// This provides detailed information about how a policy was evaluated against identities.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) LogEvaluation(\n\tctx context.Context,\n\tpolicyKey string,\n\tselectorCache *SelectorCache,\n\tresult bool,\n) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tfields := logrus.Fields{\n\t\tlogfields.PolicyKey: policyKey,\n\t\t\"result\":            result,\n\t}\n\n\t// Add selector cache info if available\n\tif selectorCache != nil {\n\t\t// Get the model representation for audit purposes\n\t\tmodel := selectorCache.GetModel()\n\t\tfields[\"selectors_count\"] = len(model)\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to standard logger if enabled\n\tif pal.logger.Logger.Level >= pal.logLevel {\n\t\tentry := pal.logger.WithFields(fields)\n\t\tif result {\n\t\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy evaluation completed: pass\")\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy evaluation completed: fail\")\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to audit logger if configured\n\tif pal.auditEntry != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditEntry.WithFields(fields).Info(\"policy-evaluation\")\n\t}\n}\n\n// SetLogLevel updates the log level for both standard and audit loggers.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) SetLogLevel(level logrus.Level) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tpal.logLevel = level\n\tif pal.auditLog != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditLog.SetLevel(level)\n\t}\n}\n\n// GetLogLevel returns the current log level.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) GetLogLevel() logrus.Level {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\treturn pal.logLevel\n}\n",

84. Edit @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/pkg/policy/audit_logger.go",
  "new_string": "// SetLogLevel updates the log level for the audit logger if configured.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) SetLogLevel(level logrus.Level) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tif pal.auditLog != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditLog.SetLevel(level)\n\t}\n}\n\n// GetLogLevel returns the current log level of the audit logger, or InfoLevel if not configured.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) GetLogLevel() logrus.Level {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tif pal.auditLog != nil {\n\t\treturn pal.auditLog.Level\n\t}\n\treturn logrus.InfoLevel\n}",
  "old_string": "// SetLogLevel updates the log level for both standard and audit loggers.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) SetLogLevel(level logrus.Level) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tpal.logLevel = level\n\tif pal.auditLog != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditLog.SetLevel(level)\n\t}\n}\n\n// GetLogLevel returns the current log level.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) GetLogLevel() logrus.Level {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\treturn pal.logLevel\n}",
  "replace_all": false
}

  "filePath": "/workspace/pkg/policy/audit_logger.go",

(\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/identity\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/lock\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/logging\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/logging/logfields\"\n)\n\nvar log = logging.DefaultLogger.WithField(logfields.LogSubsys, \"policy\")\n\nconst (\n\tauditLoggerSubsys = \"policy-audit\"\n\tlogMsgDecision    = \"policy-decision\"\n\tlogMsgEvaluation  = \"policy-evaluation\"\n\tfieldPolicy       = \"policy\"\n\tfieldVerdict      = \"verdict\"\n\tfieldReason       = \"reason\"\n\tfieldResult       = \"result\"\n)\n\n// PolicyAuditLogger provides structured logging of policy evaluation decisions\n// for audit and debugging purposes.\ntype PolicyAuditLogger struct {\n\tmutex      lock.Mutex\n\tlogger     *logrus.Entry\n\tauditLog   *logrus.Logger\n\tauditEntry *logrus.Entry\n}\n\n// NewPolicyAuditLogger creates a new PolicyAuditLogger with the specified configuration.\n// If auditOutput is provided, audit logs will be written to it in addition to the standard logger.\nfunc NewPolicyAuditLogger(logLevel logrus.Level, auditOutput io.Writer) *PolicyAuditLogger {\n\tpal := &PolicyAuditLogger{\n\t\tlogger: log.WithField(\"component\", \"audit\"),\n\t}\n\n\t// If auditOutput is provided, create a separate audit logger\n\tif auditOutput != nil {\n\t\tauditLog := logrus.New()\n\t\tauditLog.SetFormatter(&logrus.JSONFormatter{\n\t\t\tDisableTimestamp: false,\n\t\t\tTimestampFormat:  time.RFC3339Nano,\n\t\t})\n\t\tauditLog.SetOutput(auditOutput)\n\t\tauditLog.SetLevel(logLevel)\n\t\tpal.auditLog = auditLog\n\t\tpal.auditEntry = auditLog.WithField(logfields.LogSubsys, auditLoggerSubsys)\n\t}\n\n\treturn pal\n}\n\n// LogDecision logs a policy decision with the given parameters.\n// This is used for audit trail of policy verdicts.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) LogDecision(\n\tidentity identity.NumericIdentity,\n\tpolicy string,\n\tverdict string,\n\treason string,\n) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tfields := logrus.Fields{\n\t\tlogfields.Identity: identity,\n\t\tfieldPolicy:        policy,\n\t\tfieldVerdict:       verdict,\n\t\tfieldReason:        reason,\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to standard logger\n\tentry := pal.logger.WithFields(fields)\n\tswitch verdict {\n\tcase \"allow\":\n\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy decision: allow\")\n\tcase \"deny\":\n\t\tentry.Warning(\"Policy decision: deny\")\n\tdefault:\n\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy decision\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to audit logger if configured\n\tif pal.auditEntry != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditEntry.WithFields(fields).Info(logMsgDecision)\n\t}\n}\n\n// LogEvaluation logs a policy evaluation with full context.\n// This provides detailed information about how a policy was evaluated against identities.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) LogEvaluation(\n\tctx context.Context,\n\tpolicyKey string,\n\tselectorCache *SelectorCache,\n\tresult bool,\n) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tfields := logrus.Fields{\n\t\tlogfields.PolicyKey: policyKey,\n\t\tfieldResult:         result,\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to standard logger\n\tentry := pal.logger.WithFields(fields)\n\tif result {\n\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy evaluation completed: pass\")\n\t} else {\n\t\tentry.Debug(\"Policy evaluation completed: fail\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Log to audit logger if configured\n\tif pal.auditEntry != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditEntry.WithFields(fields).Info(logMsgEvaluation)\n\t}\n}\n\n// SetLogLevel updates the log level for both standard and audit loggers.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) SetLogLevel(level logrus.Level) {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\n\tpal.logLevel = level\n\tif pal.auditLog != nil {\n\t\tpal.auditLog.SetLevel(level)\n\t}\n}\n\n// GetLogLevel returns the current log level.\nfunc (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) GetLogLevel() logrus.Level {\n\tpal.mutex.Lock()\n\tdefer pal.mutex.Unlock()\n\treturn pal.logLevel\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "   }",
        " }",
        " ",
        "-// SetLogLevel updates the log level for both standard and audit loggers.",
        "+// SetLogLevel updates the log level for the audit logger if configured.",
        " func (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) SetLogLevel(level logrus.Level) {",
        "   pal.mutex.Lock()",
        "   defer pal.mutex.Unlock()",
        " ",
        "-  pal.logLevel = level",
        "   if pal.auditLog != nil {",
        "     pal.auditLog.SetLevel(level)",
        "   }",
        " }",
        " ",
        "-// GetLogLevel returns the current log level.",
        "+// GetLogLevel returns the current log level of the audit logger, or InfoLevel if not configured.",
        " func (pal *PolicyAuditLogger) GetLogLevel() logrus.Level {",
        "   pal.mutex.Lock()",
        "   defer pal.mutex.Unlock()",
        "-  return pal.logLevel",
        "+",
        "+  if pal.auditLog != nil {",
        "+    return pal.auditLog.Level",
        "+  }",
        "+  return logrus.InfoLevel",
        " }"
      ],

      "newStart": 125,
      "oldLines": 20,
      "oldStart": 125
    }
  ],
  "userModified": false
}

Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/pkg/policy/audit_logger_test.go",
  "new_string": "// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n// Copyright Authors of Cilium\n\npackage policy\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/identity\"\n)\n\n// setupAuditLogger creates a new PolicyAuditLogger with a buffer for testing.\nfunc setupAuditLogger(t *testing.T, level logrus.Level) (*bytes.Buffer, *PolicyAuditLogger) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(level, buf)\n\treturn buf, logger\n}\n\n// parseAuditLog parses a JSON audit log entry from the buffer output.\nfunc parseAuditLog(t *testing.T, logOutput string) map[string]interface{} {\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\treturn auditEntry\n}",
  "old_string": "// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n// Copyright Authors of Cilium\n\npackage policy\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/identity\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/labels\"\n)",
  "replace_all": false
}
Output
{
  "filePath": "/workspace/pkg/policy/audit_logger_test.go",
  "newString": "// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n// Copyright Authors of Cilium\n\npackage policy\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/identity\"\n)\n\n// setupAuditLogger creates a new PolicyAuditLogger with a buffer for testing.\nfunc setupAuditLogger(t *testing.T, level logrus.Level) (*bytes.Buffer, *PolicyAuditLogger) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(level, buf)\n\treturn buf, logger\n}\n\n// parseAuditLog parses a JSON audit log entry from the buffer output.\nfunc parseAuditLog(t *testing.T, logOutput string) map[string]interface{} {\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\treturn auditEntry\n}",
  "oldString": "// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n// Copyright Authors of Cilium\n\npackage policy\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/identity\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/labels\"\n)",
  "originalFile": "// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n// Copyright Authors of Cilium\n\npackage policy\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/identity\"\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/labels\"\n)\n\nfunc TestNewPolicyAuditLogger(t *testing.T) {\n\t// Test without audit output\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.DebugLevel, nil)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, logger)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.DebugLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\trequire.Nil(t, logger.auditLog)\n\n\t// Test with audit output\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger = NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, logger)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\trequire.NotNil(t, logger.auditLog)\n}\n\nfunc TestLogDecision(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(1001)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"test-policy\", \"allow\", \"matches selector\")\n\n\t// Verify audit log contains the decision\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\t// Parse JSON to verify structure\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, float64(1001), auditEntry[\"identity\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"test-policy\", auditEntry[\"policy\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"allow\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"matches selector\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogDecisionDeny(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(2002)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"restrictive-policy\", \"deny\", \"denied by rule\")\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"deny\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"denied by rule\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogEvaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"test-policy-key\"\n\n\t// Create a minimal SelectorCache for testing\n\trepo := NewPolicyRepository(nil, nil, nil)\n\tselectorCache := repo.GetSelectorCache()\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, selectorCache, true)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, policyKey, auditEntry[logfields.PolicyKey])\n\trequire.Equal(t, true, auditEntry[\"result\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogEvaluationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"failing-policy\"\n\n\trepo := NewPolicyRepository(nil, nil, nil)\n\tselectorCache := repo.GetSelectorCache()\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, selectorCache, false)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, false, auditEntry[\"result\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogEvaluationWithoutSelectorCache(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"test-policy-no-cache\"\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, nil, true)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, policyKey, auditEntry[logfields.PolicyKey])\n}\n\nfunc TestSetLogLevel(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\tlogger.SetLogLevel(logrus.DebugLevel)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.DebugLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\tlogger.SetLogLevel(logrus.WarnLevel)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.WarnLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n}\n\nfunc TestGetLogLevel(t *testing.T) {\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.ErrorLevel, nil)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.ErrorLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n}\n\nfunc TestConcurrentLogging(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\t// Test concurrent access to LogDecision\n\tdone := make(chan bool)\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\tgo func(index int) {\n\t\t\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(3000 + uint32(index))\n\t\t\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"concurrent-policy\", \"allow\", \"test\")\n\t\t\tdone <- true\n\t\t}(i)\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\t<-done\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\t// Count the number of log entries\n\tlineCount := bytes.Count([]byte(logOutput), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 10, lineCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestConcurrentEvaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\trepo := NewPolicyRepository(nil, nil, nil)\n\tselectorCache := repo.GetSelectorCache()\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\n\tdone := make(chan bool)\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\tgo func(index int) {\n\t\t\tpolicyKey := \"policy-\" + string(rune(index))\n\t\t\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, selectorCache, index%2 == 0)\n\t\t\tdone <- true\n\t\t}(i)\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\t<-done\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\t// Count the number of log entries\n\tlineCount := bytes.Count([]byte(logOutput), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 10, lineCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestMultipleDecisionsWithDifferentVerdicts(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tverdicts := []string{\"allow\", \"deny\", \"allow\", \"deny\"}\n\tfor i, verdict := range verdicts {\n\t\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(5000 + uint32(i))\n\t\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"test-policy\", verdict, \"test reason\")\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tlines := bytes.Split(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 4, len(lines))\n\n\tfor i, verdict := range verdicts {\n\t\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\t\terr := json.Unmarshal(lines[i], &auditEntry)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\trequire.Equal(t, verdict, auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\t}\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "   \"bytes\"",
        "   \"context\"",
        "   \"encoding/json\"",
        "+  \"strconv\"",
        "+  \"sync\"",
        "   \"testing\"",
        " ",
        "   \"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"",
        "   \"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"",
        " ",
        "   \"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/identity\"",
        "-  \"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/labels\"",
        " )",
        " ",
        "+// setupAuditLogger creates a new PolicyAuditLogger with a buffer for testing.",
        "+func setupAuditLogger(t *testing.T, level logrus.Level) (*bytes.Buffer, *PolicyAuditLogger) {",
        "+  buf := &bytes.Buffer{}",
        "+  logger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(level, buf)",
        "+  return buf, logger",
        "+}",
        "+",
        "+// parseAuditLog parses a JSON audit log entry from the buffer output.",
        "+func parseAuditLog(t *testing.T, logOutput string) map[string]interface{} {",
        "+  var auditEntry map[string]interface{}",
        "+  err := json.Unmarshal(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), &auditEntry)",
        "+  require.NoError(t, err)",
        "+  return auditEntry",
        "+}",
        "+",
        " func TestNewPolicyAuditLogger(t *testing.T) {",
        "   // Test without audit output",
        "   logger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.DebugLevel, nil)"
      ],
      "newLines": 31,

  ],

{
  "filePath": "/workspace/pkg/policy/audit_logger_test.go",
  "newString": "func TestNewPolicyAuditLogger(t *testing.T) {\n\t// Test without audit output\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.DebugLevel, nil)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, logger)\n\n\t// Test with audit output\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, logger)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\t// Verify output buffer is empty at start\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"\", buf.String())\n}",
  "oldString": "func TestNewPolicyAuditLogger(t *testing.T) {\n\t// Test without audit output\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.DebugLevel, nil)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, logger)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.DebugLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\trequire.Nil(t, logger.auditLog)\n\n\t// Test with audit output\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger = NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, logger)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\trequire.NotNil(t, logger.auditLog)\n}",
  "originalFile": "// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n// Copyright Authors of Cilium\n\npackage policy\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/identity\"\n)\n\n// setupAuditLogger creates a new PolicyAuditLogger with a buffer for testing.\nfunc setupAuditLogger(t *testing.T, level logrus.Level) (*bytes.Buffer, *PolicyAuditLogger) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(level, buf)\n\treturn buf, logger\n}\n\n// parseAuditLog parses a JSON audit log entry from the buffer output.\nfunc parseAuditLog(t *testing.T, logOutput string) map[string]interface{} {\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\treturn auditEntry\n}\n\nfunc TestNewPolicyAuditLogger(t *testing.T) {\n\t// Test without audit output\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.DebugLevel, nil)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, logger)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.DebugLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\trequire.Nil(t, logger.auditLog)\n\n\t// Test with audit output\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger = NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, logger)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\trequire.NotNil(t, logger.auditLog)\n}\n\nfunc TestLogDecision(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(1001)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"test-policy\", \"allow\", \"matches selector\")\n\n\t// Verify audit log contains the decision\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\t// Parse JSON to verify structure\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, float64(1001), auditEntry[\"identity\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"test-policy\", auditEntry[\"policy\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"allow\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"matches selector\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogDecisionDeny(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(2002)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"restrictive-policy\", \"deny\", \"denied by rule\")\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"deny\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"denied by rule\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogEvaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"test-policy-key\"\n\n\t// Create a minimal SelectorCache for testing\n\trepo := NewPolicyRepository(nil, nil, nil)\n\tselectorCache := repo.GetSelectorCache()\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, selectorCache, true)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, policyKey, auditEntry[logfields.PolicyKey])\n\trequire.Equal(t, true, auditEntry[\"result\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogEvaluationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"failing-policy\"\n\n\trepo := NewPolicyRepository(nil, nil, nil)\n\tselectorCache := repo.GetSelectorCache()\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, selectorCache, false)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, false, auditEntry[\"result\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogEvaluationWithoutSelectorCache(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"test-policy-no-cache\"\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, nil, true)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, policyKey, auditEntry[logfields.PolicyKey])\n}\n\nfunc TestSetLogLevel(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\tlogger.SetLogLevel(logrus.DebugLevel)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.DebugLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\tlogger.SetLogLevel(logrus.WarnLevel)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.WarnLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n}\n\nfunc TestGetLogLevel(t *testing.T) {\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.ErrorLevel, nil)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.ErrorLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n}\n\nfunc TestConcurrentLogging(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\t// Test concurrent access to LogDecision\n\tdone := make(chan bool)\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\tgo func(index int) {\n\t\t\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(3000 + uint32(index))\n\t\t\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"concurrent-policy\", \"allow\", \"test\")\n\t\t\tdone <- true\n\t\t}(i)\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\t<-done\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\t// Count the number of log entries\n\tlineCount := bytes.Count([]byte(logOutput), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 10, lineCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestConcurrentEvaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\trepo := NewPolicyRepository(nil, nil, nil)\n\tselectorCache := repo.GetSelectorCache()\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\n\tdone := make(chan bool)\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\tgo func(index int) {\n\t\t\tpolicyKey := \"policy-\" + string(rune(index))\n\t\t\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, selectorCache, index%2 == 0)\n\t\t\tdone <- true\n\t\t}(i)\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\t<-done\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\t// Count the number of log entries\n\tlineCount := bytes.Count([]byte(logOutput), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 10, lineCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestMultipleDecisionsWithDifferentVerdicts(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tverdicts := []string{\"allow\", \"deny\", \"allow\", \"deny\"}\n\tfor i, verdict := range verdicts {\n\t\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(5000 + uint32(i))\n\t\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"test-policy\", verdict, \"test reason\")\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tlines := bytes.Split(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 4, len(lines))\n\n\tfor i, verdict := range verdicts {\n\t\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\t\terr := json.Unmarshal(lines[i], &auditEntry)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\trequire.Equal(t, verdict, auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\t}\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "   // Test without audit output",
        "   logger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.DebugLevel, nil)",
        "   require.NotNil(t, logger)",
        "-  require.Equal(t, logrus.DebugLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())",
        "-  require.Nil(t, logger.auditLog)",
        " ",
        "   // Test with audit output",
        "-  buf := &bytes.Buffer{}",
        "-  logger = NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)",
        "+  buf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)",
        "   require.NotNil(t, logger)",
        "   require.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())",
        "-  require.NotNil(t, logger.auditLog)",
        "+",

        "+  require.Equal(t, \"\", buf.String())",
        " }",
