{
  "file_path": "/workspace/pkg/policy/audit_logger_test.go",
  "new_string": "func TestLogDecision(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(1001)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"test-policy\", \"allow\", \"matches selector\")\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tauditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, float64(1001), auditEntry[\"identity\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"test-policy\", auditEntry[\"policy\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"allow\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"matches selector\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}",
  "old_string": "func TestLogDecision(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(1001)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"test-policy\", \"allow\", \"matches selector\")\n\n\t// Verify audit log contains the decision\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\t// Parse JSON to verify structure\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, float64(1001), auditEntry[\"identity\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"test-policy\", auditEntry[\"policy\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"allow\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"matches selector\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}",
  "replace_all": false
}
Output
{
  "filePath": "/workspace/pkg/policy/audit_logger_test.go",
  "newString": "func TestLogDecision(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(1001)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"test-policy\", \"allow\", \"matches selector\")\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tauditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, float64(1001), auditEntry[\"identity\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"test-policy\", auditEntry[\"policy\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"allow\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"matches selector\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}",
  "oldString": "func TestLogDecision(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(1001)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"test-policy\", \"allow\", \"matches selector\")\n\n\t// Verify audit log contains the decision\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\t// Parse JSON to verify structure\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, float64(1001), auditEntry[\"identity\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"test-policy\", auditEntry[\"policy\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"allow\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"matches selector\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}",
  "originalFile": "// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n// Copyright Authors of Cilium\n\npackage policy\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/identity\"\n)\n\n// setupAuditLogger creates a new PolicyAuditLogger with a buffer for testing.\nfunc setupAuditLogger(t *testing.T, level logrus.Level) (*bytes.Buffer, *PolicyAuditLogger) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(level, buf)\n\treturn buf, logger\n}\n\n// parseAuditLog parses a JSON audit log entry from the buffer output.\nfunc parseAuditLog(t *testing.T, logOutput string) map[string]interface{} {\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\treturn auditEntry\n}\n\nfunc TestNewPolicyAuditLogger(t *testing.T) {\n\t// Test without audit output\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.DebugLevel, nil)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, logger)\n\n\t// Test with audit output\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, logger)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\t// Verify output buffer is empty at start\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"\", buf.String())\n}\n\nfunc TestLogDecision(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(1001)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"test-policy\", \"allow\", \"matches selector\")\n\n\t// Verify audit log contains the decision\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\t// Parse JSON to verify structure\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, float64(1001), auditEntry[\"identity\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"test-policy\", auditEntry[\"policy\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"allow\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"matches selector\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogDecisionDeny(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(2002)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"restrictive-policy\", \"deny\", \"denied by rule\")\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"deny\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"denied by rule\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogEvaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"test-policy-key\"\n\n\t// Create a minimal SelectorCache for testing\n\trepo := NewPolicyRepository(nil, nil, nil)\n\tselectorCache := repo.GetSelectorCache()\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, selectorCache, true)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, policyKey, auditEntry[logfields.PolicyKey])\n\trequire.Equal(t, true, auditEntry[\"result\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogEvaluationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"failing-policy\"\n\n\trepo := NewPolicyRepository(nil, nil, nil)\n\tselectorCache := repo.GetSelectorCache()\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, selectorCache, false)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, false, auditEntry[\"result\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogEvaluationWithoutSelectorCache(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"test-policy-no-cache\"\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, nil, true)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, policyKey, auditEntry[logfields.PolicyKey])\n}\n\nfunc TestSetLogLevel(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\tlogger.SetLogLevel(logrus.DebugLevel)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.DebugLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\tlogger.SetLogLevel(logrus.WarnLevel)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.WarnLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n}\n\nfunc TestGetLogLevel(t *testing.T) {\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.ErrorLevel, nil)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.ErrorLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n}\n\nfunc TestConcurrentLogging(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\t// Test concurrent access to LogDecision\n\tdone := make(chan bool)\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\tgo func(index int) {\n\t\t\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(3000 + uint32(index))\n\t\t\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"concurrent-policy\", \"allow\", \"test\")\n\t\t\tdone <- true\n\t\t}(i)\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\t<-done\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\t// Count the number of log entries\n\tlineCount := bytes.Count([]byte(logOutput), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 10, lineCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestConcurrentEvaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\trepo := NewPolicyRepository(nil, nil, nil)\n\tselectorCache := repo.GetSelectorCache()\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\n\tdone := make(chan bool)\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\tgo func(index int) {\n\t\t\tpolicyKey := \"policy-\" + string(rune(index))\n\t\t\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, selectorCache, index%2 == 0)\n\t\t\tdone <- true\n\t\t}(i)\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\t<-done\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\t// Count the number of log entries\n\tlineCount := bytes.Count([]byte(logOutput), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 10, lineCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestMultipleDecisionsWithDifferentVerdicts(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tverdicts := []string{\"allow\", \"deny\", \"allow\", \"deny\"}\n\tfor i, verdict := range verdicts {\n\t\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(5000 + uint32(i))\n\t\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"test-policy\", verdict, \"test reason\")\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tlines := bytes.Split(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 4, len(lines))\n\n\tfor i, verdict := range verdicts {\n\t\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\t\terr := json.Unmarshal(lines[i], &auditEntry)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\trequire.Equal(t, verdict, auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\t}\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        " }",
        " ",
        " func TestLogDecision(t *testing.T) {",
        "-  buf := &bytes.Buffer{}",
        "-  logger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)",
        "+  buf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)",
        " ",

        "   logger.LogDecision(testID, \"test-policy\", \"allow\", \"matches selector\")",

        "-",
        "   require.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])",
        "   require.Equal(t, float64(1001), auditEntry[\"identity\"])",

Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/pkg/policy/audit_logger_test.go",
  "new_string": "func TestLogDecisionDeny(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(2002)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"restrictive-policy\", \"deny\", \"denied by rule\")\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tauditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, float64(2002), auditEntry[\"identity\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"restrictive-policy\", auditEntry[\"policy\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"deny\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"denied by rule\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}",
  "old_string": "func TestLogDecisionDeny(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(2002)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"restrictive-policy\", \"deny\", \"denied by rule\")\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"deny\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"denied by rule\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}",
  "replace_all": false
}

  "newString": "func TestLogDecisionDeny(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(2002)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"restrictive-policy\", \"deny\", \"denied by rule\")\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tauditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, float64(2002), auditEntry[\"identity\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"restrictive-policy\", auditEntry[\"policy\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"deny\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"denied by rule\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}",
  "oldString": "func TestLogDecisionDeny(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(2002)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"restrictive-policy\", \"deny\", \"denied by rule\")\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"deny\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"denied by rule\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}",
  "originalFile": "// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n// Copyright Authors of Cilium\n\npackage policy\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/identity\"\n)\n\n// setupAuditLogger creates a new PolicyAuditLogger with a buffer for testing.\nfunc setupAuditLogger(t *testing.T, level logrus.Level) (*bytes.Buffer, *PolicyAuditLogger) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(level, buf)\n\treturn buf, logger\n}\n\n// parseAuditLog parses a JSON audit log entry from the buffer output.\nfunc parseAuditLog(t *testing.T, logOutput string) map[string]interface{} {\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\treturn auditEntry\n}\n\nfunc TestNewPolicyAuditLogger(t *testing.T) {\n\t// Test without audit output\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.DebugLevel, nil)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, logger)\n\n\t// Test with audit output\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, logger)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\t// Verify output buffer is empty at start\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"\", buf.String())\n}\n\nfunc TestLogDecision(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(1001)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"test-policy\", \"allow\", \"matches selector\")\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tauditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, float64(1001), auditEntry[\"identity\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"test-policy\", auditEntry[\"policy\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"allow\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"matches selector\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogDecisionDeny(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(2002)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"restrictive-policy\", \"deny\", \"denied by rule\")\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"deny\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"denied by rule\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogEvaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"test-policy-key\"\n\n\t// Create a minimal SelectorCache for testing\n\trepo := NewPolicyRepository(nil, nil, nil)\n\tselectorCache := repo.GetSelectorCache()\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, selectorCache, true)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, policyKey, auditEntry[logfields.PolicyKey])\n\trequire.Equal(t, true, auditEntry[\"result\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogEvaluationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"failing-policy\"\n\n\trepo := NewPolicyRepository(nil, nil, nil)\n\tselectorCache := repo.GetSelectorCache()\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, selectorCache, false)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, false, auditEntry[\"result\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogEvaluationWithoutSelectorCache(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"test-policy-no-cache\"\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, nil, true)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, policyKey, auditEntry[logfields.PolicyKey])\n}\n\nfunc TestSetLogLevel(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\tlogger.SetLogLevel(logrus.DebugLevel)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.DebugLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\tlogger.SetLogLevel(logrus.WarnLevel)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.WarnLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n}\n\nfunc TestGetLogLevel(t *testing.T) {\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.ErrorLevel, nil)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.ErrorLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n}\n\nfunc TestConcurrentLogging(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\t// Test concurrent access to LogDecision\n\tdone := make(chan bool)\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\tgo func(index int) {\n\t\t\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(3000 + uint32(index))\n\t\t\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"concurrent-policy\", \"allow\", \"test\")\n\t\t\tdone <- true\n\t\t}(i)\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\t<-done\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\t// Count the number of log entries\n\tlineCount := bytes.Count([]byte(logOutput), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 10, lineCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestConcurrentEvaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\trepo := NewPolicyRepository(nil, nil, nil)\n\tselectorCache := repo.GetSelectorCache()\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\n\tdone := make(chan bool)\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\tgo func(index int) {\n\t\t\tpolicyKey := \"policy-\" + string(rune(index))\n\t\t\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, selectorCache, index%2 == 0)\n\t\t\tdone <- true\n\t\t}(i)\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\t<-done\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\t// Count the number of log entries\n\tlineCount := bytes.Count([]byte(logOutput), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 10, lineCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestMultipleDecisionsWithDifferentVerdicts(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tverdicts := []string{\"allow\", \"deny\", \"allow\", \"deny\"}\n\tfor i, verdict := range verdicts {\n\t\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(5000 + uint32(i))\n\t\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"test-policy\", verdict, \"test reason\")\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tlines := bytes.Split(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 4, len(lines))\n\n\tfor i, verdict := range verdicts {\n\t\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\t\terr := json.Unmarshal(lines[i], &auditEntry)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\trequire.Equal(t, verdict, auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\t}\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        " }",
        " ",
        " func TestLogDecisionDeny(t *testing.T) {",
        "-  buf := &bytes.Buffer{}",
        "-  logger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)",
        "+  buf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)",
        " ",
        "   testID := identity.NumericIdentity(2002)",
        "   logger.LogDecision(testID, \"restrictive-policy\", \"deny\", \"denied by rule\")",
        " ",
        "   logOutput := buf.String()",
        "-  require.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)",
        "+  auditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)",
        " ",
        "-  var auditEntry map[string]interface{}",
        "-  err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)",
        "-  require.NoError(t, err)",
        "-",
        "   require.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])",
        "+  require.Equal(t, float64(2002), auditEntry[\"identity\"])",
        "+  require.Equal(t, \"restrictive-policy\", auditEntry[\"policy\"])",
        "   require.Equal(t, \"deny\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])",
        "   require.Equal(t, \"denied by rule\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])",
        " }"
      ],

      "newStart": 63,

  "originalFile": "// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n// Copyright Authors of Cilium\n\npackage policy\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/identity\"\n)\n\n// setupAuditLogger creates a new PolicyAuditLogger with a buffer for testing.\nfunc setupAuditLogger(t *testing.T, level logrus.Level) (*bytes.Buffer, *PolicyAuditLogger) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(level, buf)\n\treturn buf, logger\n}\n\n// parseAuditLog parses a JSON audit log entry from the buffer output.\nfunc parseAuditLog(t *testing.T, logOutput string) map[string]interface{} {\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\treturn auditEntry\n}\n\nfunc TestNewPolicyAuditLogger(t *testing.T) {\n\t// Test without audit output\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.DebugLevel, nil)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, logger)\n\n\t// Test with audit output\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, logger)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\t// Verify output buffer is empty at start\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"\", buf.String())\n}\n\nfunc TestLogDecision(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(1001)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"test-policy\", \"allow\", \"matches selector\")\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tauditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, float64(1001), auditEntry[\"identity\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"test-policy\", auditEntry[\"policy\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"allow\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"matches selector\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogDecisionDeny(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(2002)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"restrictive-policy\", \"deny\", \"denied by rule\")\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tauditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, float64(2002), auditEntry[\"identity\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"restrictive-policy\", auditEntry[\"policy\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"deny\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"denied by rule\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogEvaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"test-policy-key\"\n\n\t// Create a minimal SelectorCache for testing\n\trepo := NewPolicyRepository(nil, nil, nil)\n\tselectorCache := repo.GetSelectorCache()\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, selectorCache, true)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, policyKey, auditEntry[logfields.PolicyKey])\n\trequire.Equal(t, true, auditEntry[\"result\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogEvaluationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"failing-policy\"\n\n\trepo := NewPolicyRepository(nil, nil, nil)\n\tselectorCache := repo.GetSelectorCache()\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, selectorCache, false)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, false, auditEntry[\"result\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogEvaluationWithoutSelectorCache(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"test-policy-no-cache\"\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, nil, true)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, policyKey, auditEntry[logfields.PolicyKey])\n}\n\nfunc TestSetLogLevel(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\tlogger.SetLogLevel(logrus.DebugLevel)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.DebugLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\tlogger.SetLogLevel(logrus.WarnLevel)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.WarnLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n}\n\nfunc TestGetLogLevel(t *testing.T) {\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.ErrorLevel, nil)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.ErrorLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n}\n\nfunc TestConcurrentLogging(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\t// Test concurrent access to LogDecision\n\tdone := make(chan bool)\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\tgo func(index int) {\n\t\t\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(3000 + uint32(index))\n\t\t\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"concurrent-policy\", \"allow\", \"test\")\n\t\t\tdone <- true\n\t\t}(i)\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\t<-done\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\t// Count the number of log entries\n\tlineCount := bytes.Count([]byte(logOutput), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 10, lineCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestConcurrentEvaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\trepo := NewPolicyRepository(nil, nil, nil)\n\tselectorCache := repo.GetSelectorCache()\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\n\tdone := make(chan bool)\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\tgo func(index int) {\n\t\t\tpolicyKey := \"policy-\" + string(rune(index))\n\t\t\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, selectorCache, index%2 == 0)\n\t\t\tdone <- true\n\t\t}(i)\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\t<-done\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\t// Count the number of log entries\n\tlineCount := bytes.Count([]byte(logOutput), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 10, lineCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestMultipleDecisionsWithDifferentVerdicts(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tverdicts := []string{\"allow\", \"deny\", \"allow\", \"deny\"}\n\tfor i, verdict := range verdicts {\n\t\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(5000 + uint32(i))\n\t\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 4, len(lines))\n\n\tfor i, verdict := range verdicts {\n\t\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\t\terr := json.Unmarshal(lines[i], &auditEntry)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\trequire.Equal(t, verdict, auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\t}\n}\n",

  "old_string": "func TestLogEvaluationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"failing-policy\"\n\n\trepo := NewPolicyRepository(nil, nil, nil)\n\tselectorCache := repo.GetSelectorCache()\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, selectorCache, false)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, false, auditEntry[\"result\"])\n}",

Output
{
  "filePath": "/workspace/pkg/policy/audit_logger_test.go",
  "newString": "func TestLogEvaluationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"failing-policy\"\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, nil, false)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tauditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, policyKey, auditEntry[logfields.PolicyKey])\n\trequire.Equal(t, false, auditEntry[\"result\"])\n}",
  "oldString": "func TestLogEvaluationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"failing-policy\"\n\n\trepo := NewPolicyRepository(nil, nil, nil)\n\tselectorCache := repo.GetSelectorCache()\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, selectorCache, false)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, false, auditEntry[\"result\"])\n}",
  "originalFile": "// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n// Copyright Authors of Cilium\n\npackage policy\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/identity\"\n)\n\n// setupAuditLogger creates a new PolicyAuditLogger with a buffer for testing.\nfunc setupAuditLogger(t *testing.T, level logrus.Level) (*bytes.Buffer, *PolicyAuditLogger) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(level, buf)\n\treturn buf, logger\n}\n\n// parseAuditLog parses a JSON audit log entry from the buffer output.\nfunc parseAuditLog(t *testing.T, logOutput string) map[string]interface{} {\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\treturn auditEntry\n}\n\nfunc TestNewPolicyAuditLogger(t *testing.T) {\n\t// Test without audit output\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.DebugLevel, nil)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, logger)\n\n\t// Test with audit output\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, logger)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\t// Verify output buffer is empty at start\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"\", buf.String())\n}\n\nfunc TestLogDecision(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(1001)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"test-policy\", \"allow\", \"matches selector\")\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tauditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, float64(1001), auditEntry[\"identity\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"test-policy\", auditEntry[\"policy\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"allow\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"matches selector\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogDecisionDeny(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(2002)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"restrictive-policy\", \"deny\", \"denied by rule\")\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tauditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, float64(2002), auditEntry[\"identity\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"restrictive-policy\", auditEntry[\"policy\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"deny\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"denied by rule\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogEvaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"test-policy-key\"\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, nil, true)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tauditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, policyKey, auditEntry[logfields.PolicyKey])\n\trequire.Equal(t, true, auditEntry[\"result\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogEvaluationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"failing-policy\"\n\n\trepo := NewPolicyRepository(nil, nil, nil)\n\tselectorCache := repo.GetSelectorCache()\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, selectorCache, false)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, false, auditEntry[\"result\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogEvaluationWithoutSelectorCache(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"test-policy-no-cache\"\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, nil, true)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, policyKey, auditEntry[logfields.PolicyKey])\n}\n\nfunc TestSetLogLevel(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\tlogger.SetLogLevel(logrus.DebugLevel)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.DebugLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\tlogger.SetLogLevel(logrus.WarnLevel)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.WarnLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n}\n\nfunc TestGetLogLevel(t *testing.T) {\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.ErrorLevel, nil)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.ErrorLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n}\n\nfunc TestConcurrentLogging(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\t// Test concurrent access to LogDecision\n\tdone := make(chan bool)\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\tgo func(index int) {\n\t\t\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(3000 + uint32(index))\n\t\t\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"concurrent-policy\", \"allow\", \"test\")\n\t\t\tdone <- true\n\t\t}(i)\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\t<-done\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\t// Count the number of log entries\n\tlineCount := bytes.Count([]byte(logOutput), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 10, lineCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestConcurrentEvaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\trepo := NewPolicyRepository(nil, nil, nil)\n\tselectorCache := repo.GetSelectorCache()\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\n\tdone := make(chan bool)\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\tgo func(index int) {\n\t\t\tpolicyKey := \"policy-\" + string(rune(index))\n\t\t\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, selectorCache, index%2 == 0)\n\t\t\tdone <- true\n\t\t}(i)\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\t<-done\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\t// Count the number of log entries\n\tlineCount := bytes.Count([]byte(logOutput), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 10, lineCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestMultipleDecisionsWithDifferentVerdicts(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tverdicts := []string{\"allow\", \"deny\", \"allow\", \"deny\"}\n\tfor i, verdict := range verdicts {\n\t\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(5000 + uint32(i))\n\t\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"test-policy\", verdict, \"test reason\")\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tlines := bytes.Split(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 4, len(lines))\n\n\tfor i, verdict := range verdicts {\n\t\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\t\terr := json.Unmarshal(lines[i], &auditEntry)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\trequire.Equal(t, verdict, auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\t}\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        " }",
        " ",
        " func TestLogEvaluationFailure(t *testing.T) {",
        "-  buf := &bytes.Buffer{}",
        "-  logger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)",
        "+  buf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)",
        " ",
        "   ctx := context.Background()",
        "   policyKey := \"failing-policy\"",
        " ",
        "-  repo := NewPolicyRepository(nil, nil, nil)",
        "-  selectorCache := repo.GetSelectorCache()",
        "+  logger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, nil, false)",
        " ",
        "-  logger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, selectorCache, false)",
        "-",
        "   logOutput := buf.String()",
        "-  require.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)",
        "+  auditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)",
        " ",
        "-  var auditEntry map[string]interface{}",
        "-  err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)",
        "-  require.NoError(t, err)",
        "-",
        "   require.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])",
        "+  require.Equal(t, policyKey, auditEntry[logfields.PolicyKey])",
        "   require.Equal(t, false, auditEntry[\"result\"])",
        " }",
        " "
      ],
      "newLines": 18,
      "newStart": 95,
      "oldLines": 25,
      "oldStart": 95
    }
  ],
  "userModified": false
}

(\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/identity\"\n)\n\n// setupAuditLogger creates a new PolicyAuditLogger with a buffer for testing.\nfunc setupAuditLogger(t *testing.T, level logrus.Level) (*bytes.Buffer, *PolicyAuditLogger) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(level, buf)\n\treturn buf, logger\n}\n\n// parseAuditLog parses a JSON audit log entry from the buffer output.\nfunc parseAuditLog(t *testing.T, logOutput string) map[string]interface{} {\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\treturn auditEntry\n}\n\nfunc TestNewPolicyAuditLogger(t *testing.T) {\n\t// Test without audit output\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.DebugLevel, nil)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, logger)\n\n\t// Test with audit output\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, logger)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\t// Verify output buffer is empty at start\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"\", buf.String())\n}\n\nfunc TestLogDecision(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(1001)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"test-policy\", \"allow\", \"matches selector\")\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tauditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, float64(1001), auditEntry[\"identity\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"test-policy\", auditEntry[\"policy\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"allow\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"matches selector\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogDecisionDeny(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(2002)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"restrictive-policy\", \"deny\", \"denied by rule\")\n\n\tlogOutput := auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogEvaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"test-policy-key\"\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, nil, true)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tauditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, policyKey, auditEntry[logfields.PolicyKey])\n\trequire.Equal(t, true, auditEntry[\"result\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogEvaluationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"failing-policy\"\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, nil, false)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tauditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, policyKey, auditEntry[logfields.PolicyKey])\n\trequire.Equal(t, false, auditEntry[\"result\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogEvaluationWithoutSelectorCache(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"test-policy-no-cache\"\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, nil, true)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logOutput[:len(logOutput)-1]), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, policyKey, auditEntry[logfields.PolicyKey])\n}\n\nfunc TestSetLogLevel(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\tlogger.SetLogLevel(logrus.DebugLevel)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.DebugLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\tlogger.SetLogLevel(logrus.WarnLevel)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.WarnLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n}\n\nfunc TestGetLogLevel(t *testing.T) {\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.ErrorLevel, nil)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.ErrorLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n}\n\nfunc TestConcurrentLogging(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\t// Test concurrent access to LogDecision\n\tdone := make(chan bool)\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\tgo func(index int) {\n\t\t\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(3000 + uint32(index))\n\t\t\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"concurrent-policy\", \"allow\", \"test\")\n\t\t\tdone <- true\n\t\t}(i)\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\t<-done\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\t// Count the number of log entries\n\tlineCount := bytes.Count([]byte(logOutput), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 10, lineCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestConcurrentEvaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\trepo := NewPolicyRepository(nil, nil, nil)\n\tselectorCache := repo.GetSelectorCache()\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\n\tdone := make(chan bool)\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\tgo func(index int) {\n\t\t\tpolicyKey := \"policy-\" + string(rune(index))\n\t\t\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, selectorCache, index%2 == 0)\n\t\t\tdone <- true\n\t\t}(i)\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 10, lineCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestMultipleDecisionsWithDifferentVerdicts(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tverdicts := []string{\"allow\", \"deny\", \"allow\", \"deny\"}\n\tfor i, verdict := range verdicts {\n\t\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(5000 + uint32(i))\n\t\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"test-policy\", verdict, \"test reason\")\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tlines := bytes.Split(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 4, len(lines))\n\n\tfor i, verdict := range verdicts {\n\t\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\t\terr := json.Unmarshal(lines[i], &auditEntry)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\trequire.Equal(t, verdict, auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\t}\n}\n",

Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/pkg/policy/audit_logger_test.go",
  "new_string": "func TestGetLogLevelWithoutAuditLogger(t *testing.T) {\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.ErrorLevel, nil)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n}",
  "old_string": "func TestSetLogLevel(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\tlogger.SetLogLevel(logrus.DebugLevel)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.DebugLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\tlogger.SetLogLevel(logrus.WarnLevel)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.WarnLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n}\n\nfunc TestGetLogLevel(t *testing.T) {\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.ErrorLevel, nil)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.ErrorLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n}",
  "replace_all": false
}
Output
{
  "filePath": "/workspace/pkg/policy/audit_logger_test.go",
  "newString": "func TestGetLogLevelWithoutAuditLogger(t *testing.T) {\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.ErrorLevel, nil)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n}",
  "oldString": "func TestSetLogLevel(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\tlogger.SetLogLevel(logrus.DebugLevel)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.DebugLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\tlogger.SetLogLevel(logrus.WarnLevel)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.WarnLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n}\n\nfunc TestGetLogLevel(t *testing.T) {\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.ErrorLevel, nil)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.ErrorLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n}",
  "originalFile": "// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n// Copyright Authors of Cilium\n\npackage policy\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/identity\"\n)\n\n// setupAuditLogger creates a new PolicyAuditLogger with a buffer for testing.\nfunc setupAuditLogger(t *testing.T, level logrus.Level) (*bytes.Buffer, *PolicyAuditLogger) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(level, buf)\n\treturn buf, logger\n}\n\n// parseAuditLog parses a JSON audit log entry from the buffer output.\nfunc parseAuditLog(t *testing.T, logOutput string) map[string]interface{} {\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\treturn auditEntry\n}\n\nfunc TestNewPolicyAuditLogger(t *testing.T) {\n\t// Test without audit output\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.DebugLevel, nil)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, logger)\n\n\t// Test with audit output\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, logger)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\t// Verify output buffer is empty at start\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"\", buf.String())\n}\n\nfunc TestLogDecision(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(1001)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"test-policy\", \"allow\", \"matches selector\")\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tauditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, float64(1001), auditEntry[\"identity\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"test-policy\", auditEntry[\"policy\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"allow\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"matches selector\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogDecisionDeny(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(2002)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"restrictive-policy\", \"deny\", \"denied by rule\")\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tauditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, float64(2002), auditEntry[\"identity\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"restrictive-policy\", auditEntry[\"policy\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"deny\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"denied by rule\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogEvaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"test-policy-key\"\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, nil, true)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tauditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, policyKey, auditEntry[logfields.PolicyKey])\n\trequire.Equal(t, true, auditEntry[\"result\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogEvaluationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"failing-policy\"\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, nil, false)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tauditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, policyKey, auditEntry[logfields.PolicyKey])\n\trequire.Equal(t, false, auditEntry[\"result\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogLevelManagement(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\tlogger.SetLogLevel(logrus.DebugLevel)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.DebugLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\tlogger.SetLogLevel(logrus.WarnLevel)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.WarnLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n}\n\nfunc TestSetLogLevel(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\tlogger.SetLogLevel(logrus.DebugLevel)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.DebugLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\tlogger.SetLogLevel(logrus.WarnLevel)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.WarnLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n}\n\nfunc TestGetLogLevel(t *testing.T) {\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.ErrorLevel, nil)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.ErrorLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n}\n\nfunc TestConcurrentLogging(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\t// Test concurrent access to LogDecision\n\tdone := make(chan bool)\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\tgo func(index int) {\n\t\t\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(3000 + uint32(index))\n\t\t\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"concurrent-policy\", \"allow\", \"test\")\n\t\t\tdone <- true\n\t\t}(i)\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\t<-done\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\t// Count the number of log entries\n\tlineCount := bytes.Count([]byte(logOutput), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 10, lineCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestConcurrentEvaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\trepo := NewPolicyRepository(nil, nil, nil)\n\tselectorCache := repo.GetSelectorCache()\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\n\tdone := make(chan bool)\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\tgo func(index int) {\n\t\t\tpolicyKey := \"policy-\" + string(rune(index))\n\t\t\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, selectorCache, index%2 == 0)\n\t\t\tdone <- true\n\t\t}(i)\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\t<-done\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\t// Count the number of log entries\n\tlineCount := bytes.Count([]byte(logOutput), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 10, lineCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestMultipleDecisionsWithDifferentVerdicts(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tverdicts := []string{\"allow\", \"deny\", \"allow\", \"deny\"}\n\tfor i, verdict := range verdicts {\n\t\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(5000 + uint32(i))\n\t\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"test-policy\", verdict, \"test reason\")\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tlines := bytes.Split(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 4, len(lines))\n\n\tfor i, verdict := range verdicts {\n\t\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\t\terr := json.Unmarshal(lines[i], &auditEntry)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\trequire.Equal(t, verdict, auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\t}\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "   require.Equal(t, logrus.WarnLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())",
        " }",
        " ",
        "-func TestSetLogLevel(t *testing.T) {",
        "-  buf := &bytes.Buffer{}",
        "-  logger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)",
        "-",
        "+func TestGetLogLevelWithoutAuditLogger(t *testing.T) {",
        "+  logger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.ErrorLevel, nil)",
        "   require.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())",
        "-",
        "-  logger.SetLogLevel(logrus.DebugLevel)",
        "-  require.Equal(t, logrus.DebugLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())",
        "-",
        "-  logger.SetLogLevel(logrus.WarnLevel)",
        "-  require.Equal(t, logrus.WarnLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())",
        " }",
        " ",
        "-func TestGetLogLevel(t *testing.T) {",
        "-  logger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.ErrorLevel, nil)",
        "-  require.Equal(t, logrus.ErrorLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())",
        "-}",
        "-",
        " func TestConcurrentLogging(t *testing.T) {",
        "   buf := &bytes.Buffer{}",
        "   logger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)"
      ],
      "newLines": 11,
      "newStart": 122,
      "oldLines": 24,
      "oldStart": 122
    }
  ],
  "userModified": false
}

Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/pkg/policy/audit_logger_test.go",
  "new_string": "func TestConcurrentLogging(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\tvar wg sync.WaitGroup\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\twg.Add(1)\n\t\tgo func(index int) {\n\t\t\tdefer wg.Done()\n\t\t\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(3000 + uint32(index))\n\t\t\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"concurrent-policy\", \"allow\", \"test\")\n\t\t}(i)\n\t}\n\twg.Wait()\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tlines := bytes.Split(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 10, len(lines))\n\n\t// Verify all entries are policy-decision messages\n\tfor _, line := range lines {\n\t\tentry := parseAuditLog(t, string(line))\n\t\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", entry[\"msg\"])\n\t}\n}",
  "old_string": "func TestConcurrentLogging(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\t// Test concurrent access to LogDecision\n\tdone := make(chan bool)\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\tgo func(index int) {\n\t\t\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(3000 + uint32(index))\n\t\t\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"concurrent-policy\", \"allow\", \"test\")\n\t\t\tdone <- true\n\t\t}(i)\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\t<-done\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\t// Count the number of log entries\n\tlineCount := bytes.Count([]byte(logOutput), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 10, lineCount)\n}",
  "replace_all": false
}

  "newString": "func TestConcurrentLogging(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\tvar wg sync.WaitGroup\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\twg.Add(1)\n\t\tgo func(index int) {\n\t\t\tdefer wg.Done()\n\t\t\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(3000 + uint32(index))\n\t\t\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"concurrent-policy\", \"allow\", \"test\")\n\t\t}(i)\n\t}\n\twg.Wait()\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tlines := bytes.Split(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 10, len(lines))\n\n\t// Verify all entries are policy-decision messages\n\tfor _, line := range lines {\n\t\tentry := parseAuditLog(t, string(line))\n\t\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", entry[\"msg\"])\n\t}\n}",

  "originalFile": "// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n// Copyright Authors of Cilium\n\npackage policy\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/identity\"\n)\n\n// setupAuditLogger creates a new PolicyAuditLogger with a buffer for testing.\nfunc setupAuditLogger(t *testing.T, level logrus.Level) (*bytes.Buffer, *PolicyAuditLogger) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(level, buf)\n\treturn buf, logger\n}\n\n// parseAuditLog parses a JSON audit log entry from the buffer output.\nfunc parseAuditLog(t *testing.T, logOutput string) map[string]interface{} {\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\treturn auditEntry\n}\n\nfunc TestNewPolicyAuditLogger(t *testing.T) {\n\t// Test without audit output\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.DebugLevel, nil)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, logger)\n\n\t// Test with audit output\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, logger)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\t// Verify output buffer is empty at start\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"\", buf.String())\n}\n\nfunc TestLogDecision(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(1001)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"test-policy\", \"allow\", \"matches selector\")\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tauditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, float64(1001), auditEntry[\"identity\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"test-policy\", auditEntry[\"policy\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"allow\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"matches selector\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogDecisionDeny(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(2002)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"restrictive-policy\", \"deny\", \"denied by rule\")\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tauditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, float64(2002), auditEntry[\"identity\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"restrictive-policy\", auditEntry[\"policy\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"deny\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"denied by rule\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogEvaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"test-policy-key\"\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, nil, true)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tauditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, policyKey, auditEntry[logfields.PolicyKey])\n\trequire.Equal(t, true, auditEntry[\"result\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogEvaluationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"failing-policy\"\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, nil, false)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tauditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, policyKey, auditEntry[logfields.PolicyKey])\n\trequire.Equal(t, false, auditEntry[\"result\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogLevelManagement(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\tlogger.SetLogLevel(logrus.DebugLevel)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.DebugLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\tlogger.SetLogLevel(logrus.WarnLevel)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.WarnLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n}\n\nfunc TestGetLogLevelWithoutAuditLogger(t *testing.T) {\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.ErrorLevel, nil)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n}\n\nfunc TestConcurrentLogging(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\t// Test concurrent access to LogDecision\n\tdone := make(chan bool)\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\tgo func(index int) {\n\t\t\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(3000 + uint32(index))\n\t\t\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"concurrent-policy\", \"allow\", \"test\")\n\t\t\tdone <- true\n\t\t}(i)\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\t<-done\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\t// Count the number of log entries\n\tlineCount := bytes.Count([]byte(logOutput), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 10, lineCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestConcurrentEvaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\trepo := NewPolicyRepository(nil, nil, nil)\n\tselectorCache := repo.GetSelectorCache()\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\n\tdone := make(chan bool)\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\tgo func(index int) {\n\t\t\tpolicyKey := \"policy-\" + string(rune(index))\n\t\t\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, selectorCache, index%2 == 0)\n\t\t\tdone <- true\n\t\t}(i)\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\t<-done\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\t// Count the number of log entries\n\tlineCount := bytes.Count([]byte(logOutput), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 10, lineCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestMultipleDecisionsWithDifferentVerdicts(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tverdicts := []string{\"allow\", \"deny\", \"allow\", \"deny\"}\n\tfor i, verdict := range verdicts {\n\t\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(5000 + uint32(i))\n\t\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"test-policy\", verdict, \"test reason\")\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tlines := bytes.Split(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 4, len(lines))\n\n\tfor i, verdict := range verdicts {\n\t\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\t\terr := json.Unmarshal(lines[i], &auditEntry)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\trequire.Equal(t, verdict, auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\t}\n}\n",

94. Edit @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/pkg/policy/audit_logger_test.go",
  "new_string": "func TestConcurrentEvaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\n\tvar wg sync.WaitGroup\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\twg.Add(1)\n\t\tgo func(index int) {\n\t\t\tdefer wg.Done()\n\t\t\tpolicyKey := \"policy-\" + strconv.Itoa(index)\n\t\t\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, nil, index%2 == 0)\n\t\t}(i)\n\t}\n\twg.Wait()\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tlines := bytes.Split(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 10, len(lines))\n\n\t// Verify all entries are policy-evaluation messages\n\tfor i, line := range lines {\n\t\tentry := parseAuditLog(t, string(line))\n\t\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", entry[\"msg\"])\n\t\trequire.Equal(t, i%2 == 0, entry[\"result\"])\n\t}\n}",
  "old_string": "func TestConcurrentEvaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\trepo := NewPolicyRepository(nil, nil, nil)\n\tselectorCache := repo.GetSelectorCache()\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\n\tdone := make(chan bool)\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\tgo func(index int) {\n\t\t\tpolicyKey := \"policy-\" + string(rune(index))\n\t\t\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, selectorCache, index%2 == 0)\n\t\t\tdone <- true\n\t\t}(i)\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\t<-done\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\t// Count the number of log entries\n\tlineCount := bytes.Count([]byte(logOutput), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 10, lineCount)\n}",
  "replace_all": false
}
Output
{
  "filePath": "/workspace/pkg/policy/audit_logger_test.go",
  "newString": "func TestConcurrentEvaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\n\tvar wg sync.WaitGroup\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\twg.Add(1)\n\t\tgo func(index int) {\n\t\t\tdefer wg.Done()\n\t\t\tpolicyKey := \"policy-\" + strconv.Itoa(index)\n\t\t\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, nil, index%2 == 0)\n\t\t}(i)\n\t}\n\twg.Wait()\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tlines := bytes.Split(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 10, len(lines))\n\n\t// Verify all entries are policy-evaluation messages\n\tfor i, line := range lines {\n\t\tentry := parseAuditLog(t, string(line))\n\t\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", entry[\"msg\"])\n\t\trequire.Equal(t, i%2 == 0, entry[\"result\"])\n\t}\n}",
  "oldString": "func TestConcurrentEvaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\trepo := NewPolicyRepository(nil, nil, nil)\n\tselectorCache := repo.GetSelectorCache()\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\n\tdone := make(chan bool)\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\tgo func(index int) {\n\t\t\tpolicyKey := \"policy-\" + string(rune(index))\n\t\t\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, selectorCache, index%2 == 0)\n\t\t\tdone <- true\n\t\t}(i)\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\t<-done\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\t// Count the number of log entries\n\tlineCount := bytes.Count([]byte(logOutput), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 10, lineCount)\n}",
  "originalFile": "// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n// Copyright Authors of Cilium\n\npackage policy\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cilium/cilium/pkg/identity\"\n)\n\n// setupAuditLogger creates a new PolicyAuditLogger with a buffer for testing.\nfunc setupAuditLogger(t *testing.T, level logrus.Level) (*bytes.Buffer, *PolicyAuditLogger) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(level, buf)\n\treturn buf, logger\n}\n\n// parseAuditLog parses a JSON audit log entry from the buffer output.\nfunc parseAuditLog(t *testing.T, logOutput string) map[string]interface{} {\n\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), &auditEntry)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\treturn auditEntry\n}\n\nfunc TestNewPolicyAuditLogger(t *testing.T) {\n\t// Test without audit output\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.DebugLevel, nil)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, logger)\n\n\t// Test with audit output\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, logger)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\t// Verify output buffer is empty at start\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"\", buf.String())\n}\n\nfunc TestLogDecision(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(1001)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"test-policy\", \"allow\", \"matches selector\")\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tauditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, float64(1001), auditEntry[\"identity\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"test-policy\", auditEntry[\"policy\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"allow\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"matches selector\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogDecisionDeny(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(2002)\n\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"restrictive-policy\", \"deny\", \"denied by rule\")\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tauditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, float64(2002), auditEntry[\"identity\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"restrictive-policy\", auditEntry[\"policy\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"deny\", auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"denied by rule\", auditEntry[\"reason\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogEvaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"test-policy-key\"\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, nil, true)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tauditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, policyKey, auditEntry[logfields.PolicyKey])\n\trequire.Equal(t, true, auditEntry[\"result\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogEvaluationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\tpolicyKey := \"failing-policy\"\n\n\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, nil, false)\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tauditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, logOutput)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", auditEntry[\"msg\"])\n\trequire.Equal(t, policyKey, auditEntry[logfields.PolicyKey])\n\trequire.Equal(t, false, auditEntry[\"result\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestLogLevelManagement(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\tlogger.SetLogLevel(logrus.DebugLevel)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.DebugLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n\n\tlogger.SetLogLevel(logrus.WarnLevel)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.WarnLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n}\n\nfunc TestGetLogLevelWithoutAuditLogger(t *testing.T) {\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.ErrorLevel, nil)\n\trequire.Equal(t, logrus.InfoLevel, logger.GetLogLevel())\n}\n\nfunc TestConcurrentLogging(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\tvar wg sync.WaitGroup\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\twg.Add(1)\n\t\tgo func(index int) {\n\t\t\tdefer wg.Done()\n\t\t\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(3000 + uint32(index))\n\t\t\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"concurrent-policy\", \"allow\", \"test\")\n\t\t}(i)\n\t}\n\twg.Wait()\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tlines := bytes.Split(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 10, len(lines))\n\n\t// Verify all entries are policy-decision messages\n\tfor _, line := range lines {\n\t\tentry := parseAuditLog(t, string(line))\n\t\trequire.Equal(t, \"policy-decision\", entry[\"msg\"])\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestConcurrentEvaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\trepo := NewPolicyRepository(nil, nil, nil)\n\tselectorCache := repo.GetSelectorCache()\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\n\tdone := make(chan bool)\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\tgo func(index int) {\n\t\t\tpolicyKey := \"policy-\" + string(rune(index))\n\t\t\tlogger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, selectorCache, index%2 == 0)\n\t\t\tdone <- true\n\t\t}(i)\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\t<-done\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\t// Count the number of log entries\n\tlineCount := bytes.Count([]byte(logOutput), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 10, lineCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestMultipleDecisionsWithDifferentVerdicts(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tverdicts := []string{\"allow\", \"deny\", \"allow\", \"deny\"}\n\tfor i, verdict := range verdicts {\n\t\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(5000 + uint32(i))\n\t\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"test-policy\", verdict, \"test reason\")\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tlines := bytes.Split(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 4, len(lines))\n\n\tfor i, verdict := range verdicts {\n\t\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\t\terr := json.Unmarshal(lines[i], &auditEntry)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\trequire.Equal(t, verdict, auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\t}\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        " }",
        " ",
        " func TestConcurrentEvaluation(t *testing.T) {",
        "-  buf := &bytes.Buffer{}",
        "-  logger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)",
        "+  buf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)",
        " ",
        "-  repo := NewPolicyRepository(nil, nil, nil)",
        "-  selectorCache := repo.GetSelectorCache()",
        "   ctx := context.Background()",
        " ",
        "-  done := make(chan bool)",
        "+  var wg sync.WaitGroup",
        "   for i := 0; i < 10; i++ {",
        "+    wg.Add(1)",
        "     go func(index int) {",
        "-      policyKey := \"policy-\" + string(rune(index))",
        "-      logger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, selectorCache, index%2 == 0)",
        "-      done <- true",
        "+      defer wg.Done()",
        "+      policyKey := \"policy-\" + strconv.Itoa(index)",
        "+      logger.LogEvaluation(ctx, policyKey, nil, index%2 == 0)",
        "     }(i)",

        "+  wg.Wait()",
        " ",
        "-  for i := 0; i < 10; i++ {",
        "-    <-done",

        "-",
        "   logOutput := buf.String()",
        "-  require.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)",
        "+  lines := bytes.Split(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), []byte(\"\\n\"))",
        "+  require.Equal(t, 10, len(lines))",
        " ",
        "-  // Count the number of log entries",
        "-  lineCount := bytes.Count([]byte(logOutput), []byte(\"\\n\"))",
        "-  require.Equal(t, 10, lineCount)",
        "+  // Verify all entries are policy-evaluation messages",
        "+  for i, line := range lines {",
        "+    entry := parseAuditLog(t, string(line))",
        "+    require.Equal(t, \"policy-evaluation\", entry[\"msg\"])",
        "+    require.Equal(t, i%2 == 0, entry[\"result\"])",

{
  "file_path": "/workspace/pkg/policy/audit_logger_test.go",
  "new_string": "func TestMultipleDecisionsWithDifferentVerdicts(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf, logger := setupAuditLogger(t, logrus.InfoLevel)\n\n\tverdicts := []string{\"allow\", \"deny\", \"allow\", \"deny\"}\n\tfor i, verdict := range verdicts {\n\t\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(5000 + uint32(i))\n\t\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"test-policy\", verdict, \"test reason\")\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\tlines := bytes.Split(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, len(verdicts), len(lines))\n\n\tfor i, verdict := range verdicts {\n\t\tauditEntry := parseAuditLog(t, string(lines[i]))\n\t\trequire.Equal(t, verdict, auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\t\trequire.Equal(t, \"test-policy\", auditEntry[\"policy\"])\n\t}\n}",
  "old_string": "func TestMultipleDecisionsWithDifferentVerdicts(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := &bytes.Buffer{}\n\tlogger := NewPolicyAuditLogger(logrus.InfoLevel, buf)\n\n\tverdicts := []string{\"allow\", \"deny\", \"allow\", \"deny\"}\n\tfor i, verdict := range verdicts {\n\t\ttestID := identity.NumericIdentity(5000 + uint32(i))\n\t\tlogger.LogDecision(testID, \"test-policy\", verdict, \"test reason\")\n\t}\n\n\tlogOutput := buf.String()\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, logOutput)\n\n\tlines := bytes.Split(bytes.TrimSpace([]byte(logOutput)), []byte(\"\\n\"))\n\trequire.Equal(t, 4, len(lines))\n\n\tfor i, verdict := range verdicts {\n\t\tvar auditEntry map[string]interface{}\n\t\terr := json.Unmarshal(lines[i], &auditEntry)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\trequire.Equal(t, verdict, auditEntry[\"verdict\"])\n\t}\n}",
  "replace_all": false
